chapters.en: And he spake unto him yet again, and said, Peradventure there shall be forty found there. And he said, I will not do for forty's sake.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕说：求主不要动怒，容我说，假若在那里见有三十个怎么样呢？他说：我在那里若见有三十个，我也不作这事。
chapters.en: And he said , Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak: Peradventure there shall thirty be found there. And he said, I will not do , if I find thirty there.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕说：我还敢对主说话，假若在那里见有二十个怎么样呢？他说：为这二十个的缘故，我也不毁灭那城。
chapters.en: And he said, Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord: Peradventure there shall be twenty found there. And he said, I will not destroy for twenty's sake.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕说：求主不要动怒，我再说这一次，假若在那里见有十个呢？他说：为这十个的缘故，我也不毁灭那城。
chapters.en: And he said, Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak yet but this once: Peradventure ten shall be found there. And he said, I will not destroy for ten's sake.

chapters.zh: 耶和华与亚伯拉罕说完了话就走了；亚伯拉罕也回到自己的地方去了。
chapters.en: And the LORD went his way, as soon as he had left communing with Abraham: and Abraham returned unto his place.

chapters.zh: 那两个天使晚上到了所多玛；罗得正坐在所多玛城门口，看见他们，就起来迎接，脸伏于地下拜，
chapters.en: And there came two angels to Sodom at even; and Lot sat in the gate of Sodom: and Lot seeing rose up to meet them; and he bowed himself with his face toward the ground;

chapters.zh: 说：我主阿，请你们到仆人家里洗洗脚，住一夜，清早起来再走。他们说：不！我们要在街上过夜。
chapters.en: And he said, Behold now, my lords, turn in, I pray you, into your servant's house, and tarry all night, and wash your feet, and ye shall rise up early, and go on your ways. And they said, Nay; but we will abide in the street all night.

chapters.zh: 罗得切切的请他们，他们这才进去，到他屋里。罗得为他们预备筵席，烤无酵饼，他们就吃了。
chapters.en: And he pressed upon them greatly; and they turned in unto him, and entered into his house; and he made them a feast, and did bake unleavened bread, and they did eat.

chapters.zh: 他们还没有躺下，所多玛城里各处的人，连老带少，都来围住那房子，
chapters.en: But before they lay down, the men of the city, the men of Sodom, compassed the house round, both old and young, all the people from every quarter:

chapters.zh: 呼叫罗得说：今日晚上到你这里来的人在那里呢？把他们带出来，任我们所为。
chapters.en: And they called unto Lot, and said unto him, Where the men which came in to thee this night? bring them out unto us, that we may know them.

chapters.zh: 罗得出来，把门关上，到众人那里，
chapters.en: And Lot went out at the door unto them, and shut the door after him,

chapters.zh: 说：众弟兄，请你们不要作这恶事。
chapters.en: And said, I pray you, brethren, do not so wickedly.

chapters.zh: 我有两个女儿，还是处女，容我领出来，任凭你们的心愿而行；只是这两个人既然到我舍下，不要向他们作甚么。
chapters.en: Behold now, I have two daughters which have not known man; let me, I pray you, bring them out unto you, and do ye to them as good in your eyes: only unto these men do nothing; for therefore came they under the shadow of my roof.

chapters.zh: 众人说：退去罢！又说：这个人来寄居，还想要作官哪！现在我们要害你比害他们更甚。众人就向前拥挤罗得，要攻破房门。
chapters.en: And they said, Stand back. And they said , This one came in to sojourn, and he will needs be a judge: now will we deal worse with thee, than with them. And they pressed sore upon the man, Lot, and came near to break the door.

chapters.zh: 只是那二人伸出手来，将罗得拉进屋去，把门关上，
chapters.en: But the men put forth their hand, and pulled Lot into the house to them, and shut to the door.

chapters.zh: 并且使门外的人，无论老少，眼都昏迷；他们摸来摸去，总寻不著房门。
chapters.en: And they smote the men that at the door of the house with blindness, both small and great: so that they wearied themselves to find the door.

chapters.zh: 二人对罗得说：你这里还有甚么人么？无论是女婿是儿女，和这城中一切属你的人，你都要将他们从这地方带出去。
chapters.en: And the men said unto Lot, Hast thou here any besides? son in law, and thy sons, and thy daughters, and whatsoever thou hast in the city, bring out of this place:

chapters.zh: 我们要毁灭这地方；因为城内罪恶的声音在耶和华面前甚大，耶和华差我们来，要毁灭这地方。
chapters.en: For we will destroy this place, because the cry of them is waxen great before the face of the LORD; and the LORD hath sent us to destroy it.

chapters.zh: 罗得就出去，告诉娶了 ( 或作将要娶 ) 他女儿的女婿们说：你们起来离开这地方，因为耶和华要毁灭这城。他女婿们却以为他说的是戏言。
chapters.en: And Lot went out, and spake unto his sons in law, which married his daughters, and said, Up, get you out of this place; for the LORD will destroy this city. But he seemed as one that mocked unto his sons in law.

chapters.zh: 天明了，天使催逼罗得说：起来！带著你的妻子和你在这里的两个女儿出去，免得你因这城里的罪恶同被剿灭。
chapters.en: And when the morning arose, then the angels hastened Lot, saying, Arise, take thy wife, and thy two daughters, which are here; lest thou be consumed in the iniquity of the city.

chapters.zh: 但罗得迟延不走。二人因为耶和华怜恤罗得，就拉著他的手和他妻子的手，并他两个女儿的手，把他们领出来，安置在城外；
chapters.en: And while he lingered, the men laid hold upon his hand, and upon the hand of his wife, and upon the hand of his two daughters; the LORD being merciful unto him: and they brought him forth, and set him without the city.

chapters.zh: 领他们出来以后，就说：逃命罢！不可回头看，也不可在平原站住。要往山上逃跑，免得你被剿灭。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when they had brought them forth abroad, that he said, Escape for thy life; look not behind thee, neither stay thou in all the plain; escape to the mountain, lest thou be consumed.

chapters.zh: 罗得对他们说：我主阿，不要如此！
chapters.en: And Lot said unto them, Oh, not so, my Lord:

chapters.zh: 你仆人已经在你眼前蒙恩；你又向我显出莫大的慈爱，救我的性命。我不能逃到山上去，恐怕这灾祸临到我，我便死了。
chapters.en: Behold now, thy servant hath found grace in thy sight, and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shewed unto me in saving my life; and I cannot escape to the mountain, lest some evil take me, and I die:

chapters.zh: 看哪，这座城又小又近，容易逃到，这不是一个小的么？求你容我逃到那里，我的性命就得存活。
chapters.en: Behold now, this city near to flee unto, and it a little one: Oh, let me escape thither, ( it not a little one?) and my soul shall live.

chapters.zh: 天使对他说：这事我也应允你；我不倾覆你所说的这城。
chapters.en: And he said unto him, See, I have accepted thee concerning this thing also, that I will not overthrow this city, for the which thou hast spoken.

chapters.zh: 你要速速地逃到那城；因为你还没有到那里，我不能作甚么。因此那城名叫琐珥 ( 就是小的意思 )。
chapters.en: Haste thee, escape thither; for I cannot do any thing till thou be come thither. Therefore the name of the city was called Zoar.

chapters.zh: 罗得到了琐珥，日头已经出来了。
chapters.en: The sun was risen upon the earth when Lot entered into Zoar.

chapters.zh: 当时，耶和华将硫磺与火从天上耶和华那里降与所多玛和蛾摩拉，
chapters.en: Then the LORD rained upon Sodom and upon Gomorrah brimstone and fire from the LORD out of heaven;

chapters.zh: 把那些城和全平原，并城里所有的居民，连地上生长的，都毁灭了。
chapters.en: And he overthrew those cities, and all the plain, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and that which grew upon the ground.

chapters.zh: 罗得的妻子在后边回头一看，就变成了一根盐柱。
chapters.en: But his wife looked back from behind him, and she became a pillar of salt.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕清早起来，到了他从前站在耶和华面前的地方，
chapters.en: And Abraham gat up early in the morning to the place where he stood before the LORD:

chapters.zh: 向所多玛和蛾摩拉与平原的全地观看，不料，那地方烟气上腾，如同烧窑一般。
chapters.en: And he looked toward Sodom and Gomorrah, and toward all the land of the plain, and beheld, and, lo, the smoke of the country went up as the smoke of a furnace.

chapters.zh: 当神毁灭平原诸城的时候，他记念亚伯拉罕，正在倾覆罗得所住之城的时候，就打发罗得从倾覆之中出来。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when God destroyed the cities of the plain, that God remembered Abraham, and sent Lot out of the midst of the overthrow, when he overthrew the cities in the which Lot dwelt.

chapters.zh: 罗得因为怕住在琐珥，就同他两个女儿从琐珥上去，住在山里；他和两个女儿住在一个洞里。
chapters.en: And Lot went up out of Zoar, and dwelt in the mountain, and his two daughters with him; for he feared to dwell in Zoar: and he dwelt in a cave, he and his two daughters.

chapters.zh: 大女儿对小女儿说：我们的父亲老了，地上又无人按著世上的常规进到我们这里。
chapters.en: And the firstborn said unto the younger, Our father old, and not a man in the earth to come in unto us after the manner of all the earth:

chapters.zh: 来！我们可以叫父亲喝酒，与他同寝。这样，我们好从他存留后裔。
chapters.en: Come, let us make our father drink wine, and we will lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.

chapters.zh: 于是，那夜他们叫父亲喝酒，大女儿就进去和他父亲同寝；他几时躺下，几时起来，父亲都不知道。
chapters.en: And they made their father drink wine that night: and the firstborn went in, and lay with her father; and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

chapters.zh: 第二天，大女儿对小女儿说：我昨夜与父亲同寝。今夜我们再叫他喝酒，你可以进去与他同寝。这样，我们好从父亲存留后裔。
chapters.en: And it came to pass on the morrow, that the firstborn said unto the younger, Behold, I lay yesternight with my father: let us make him drink wine this night also; and go thou in, lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.

chapters.zh: 于是，那夜他们又叫父亲喝酒，小女儿起来与他父亲同寝；他几时躺下，几时起来，父亲都不知道。
chapters.en: And they made their father drink wine that night also: and the younger arose, and lay with him; and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

chapters.zh: 这样，罗得的两个女儿都从他父亲怀了孕。
chapters.en: Thus were both the daughters of Lot with child by their father.

chapters.zh: 大女儿生了儿子，给他起名叫摩押，就是现今摩押人的始祖。
chapters.en: And the firstborn bare a son, and called his name Moab: the same the father of the Moabites unto this day.

chapters.zh: 小女儿也生了儿子，给他起名叫便亚米，就是现今亚扪人的始祖。
chapters.en: And the younger, she also bare a son, and called his name Benammi: the same the father of the children of Ammon unto this day.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕从那里向南地迁去，寄居在加低斯和书珥中间的基拉耳。
chapters.en: And Abraham journeyed from thence toward the south country, and dwelled between Kadesh and Shur, and sojourned in Gerar.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕称他的妻撒拉为妹子，基拉耳王亚比米勒差人把撒拉取了去。
chapters.en: And Abraham said of Sarah his wife, She my sister: and Abimelech king of Gerar sent, and took Sarah.

chapters.zh: 但夜间，神来，在梦中对亚比米勒说：你是个死人哪！因为你取了那女人来；他原是别人的妻子。
chapters.en: But God came to Abimelech in a dream by night, and said to him, Behold, thou a dead man, for the woman which thou hast taken; for she a man's wife.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒却还没有亲近撒拉；他说：主阿，连有义的国，你也要毁灭么？
chapters.en: But Abimelech had not come near her: and he said, Lord, wilt thou slay also a righteous nation?

chapters.zh: 那人岂不是自己对我说他是我的妹子么？就是女人也自己说：他是我的哥哥。我作这事是心正手洁的。
chapters.en: Said he not unto me, She my sister? and she, even she herself said, He my brother: in the integrity of my heart and innocency of my hands have I done this.

chapters.zh: 神在梦中对他说：我知道你作这事是心中正直；我也拦阻了你，免得你得罪我，所以我不容你沾著他。
chapters.en: And God said unto him in a dream, Yea, I know that thou didst this in the integrity of thy heart; for I also withheld thee from sinning against me: therefore suffered I thee not to touch her.

chapters.zh: 现在你把这人的妻子归还他；因为他是先知，他要为你祷告，使你存活。你若不归还他，你当知道，你和你所有的人都必要死。
chapters.en: Now therefore restore the man wife; for he a prophet, and he shall pray for thee, and thou shalt live: and if thou restore not, know thou that thou shalt surely die, thou, and all that thine.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒清早起来，召了众臣仆来，将这些事都说给他们听，他们都甚惧怕。
chapters.en: Therefore Abimelech rose early in the morning, and called all his servants, and told all these things in their ears: and the men were sore afraid.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒召了亚伯拉罕来，对他说：你怎么向我这样行呢？我在甚么事上得罪了你，你竟使我和我国里的人陷在大罪里？你向我行不当行的事了！
chapters.en: Then Abimelech called Abraham, and said unto him, What hast thou done unto us? and what have I offended thee, that thou hast brought on me and on my kingdom a great sin? thou hast done deeds unto me that ought not to be done.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒又对亚伯拉罕说：你见了甚么才做这事呢？
chapters.en: And Abimelech said unto Abraham, What sawest thou, that thou hast done this thing?

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕说：我以为这地方的人总不惧怕神，必为我妻子的缘故杀我。
chapters.en: And Abraham said, Because I thought, Surely the fear of God not in this place; and they will slay me for my wife's sake.

chapters.zh: 况且他也实在是我的妹子；他与我是同父异母，后来作了我的妻子。
chapters.en: And yet indeed my sister; she the daughter of my father, but not the daughter of my mother; and she became my wife.

chapters.zh: 当神叫我离开父家、飘流在外的时候，我对他说：我们无论走到甚么地方，你可以对人说：他是我的哥哥；这就是你待我的恩典了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when God caused me to wander from my father's house, that I said unto her, This thy kindness which thou shalt shew unto me; at every place whither we shall come, say of me, He my brother.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒把牛、羊、仆婢赐给亚伯拉罕，又把他的妻子撒拉归还他。
chapters.en: And Abimelech took sheep, and oxen, and menservants, and womenservants, and gave unto Abraham, and restored him Sarah his wife.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒又说：看哪，我的地都在你面前，你可以随意居住；
chapters.en: And Abimelech said, Behold, my land before thee: dwell where it pleaseth thee.

chapters.zh: 又对撒拉说：我给你哥哥一千银子，作为你在合家人面前遮羞 ( 原文作眼 ) 的，你就在众人面前没有不是了。
chapters.en: And unto Sarah he said, Behold, I have given thy brother a thousand of silver: behold, he to thee a covering of the eyes, unto all that with thee, and with all : thus she was reproved.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕祷告神，神就医好了亚比米勒和他的妻子，并他的众女仆，他们便能生育。
chapters.en: So Abraham prayed unto God: and God healed Abimelech, and his wife, and his maidservants; and they bare .

chapters.zh: 因耶和华为亚伯拉罕的妻子撒拉的缘故，已经使亚比米勒家中的妇人不能生育。
chapters.en: For the LORD had fast closed up all the wombs of the house of Abimelech, because of Sarah Abraham's wife.

chapters.zh: 耶和华按著先前的话眷顾撒拉，便照他所说的给撒拉成就。
chapters.en: And the LORD visited Sarah as he had said, and the LORD did unto Sarah as he had spoken.

chapters.zh: 当亚伯拉罕年老的时候，撒拉怀了孕；到神所说的日期，就给亚伯拉罕生了一个儿子。
chapters.en: For Sarah conceived, and bare Abraham a son in his old age, at the set time of which God had spoken to him.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕给撒拉所生的儿子起名叫以撒。
chapters.en: And Abraham called the name of his son that was born unto him, whom Sarah bare to him, Isaac.

chapters.zh: 以撒生下来第八日，亚伯拉罕照著神所吩咐的，给以撒行了割礼。
chapters.en: And Abraham circumcised his son Isaac being eight days old, as God had commanded him.

chapters.zh: 他儿子以撒生的时候，亚伯拉罕年一百岁。
chapters.en: And Abraham was an hundred years old, when his son Isaac was born unto him.

chapters.zh: 撒拉说：神使我喜笑，凡听见的必与我一同喜笑；
chapters.en: And Sarah said, God hath made me to laugh, all that hear will laugh with me.

chapters.zh: 又说：谁能预先对亚伯拉罕说撒拉要乳养婴孩呢？因为在他年老的时候，我给他生了一个儿子。
chapters.en: And she said, Who would have said unto Abraham, that Sarah should have given children suck? for I have born a son in his old age.

chapters.zh: 孩子渐长，就断了奶。以撒断奶的日子，亚伯拉罕设摆丰盛的筵席。
chapters.en: And the child grew, and was weaned: and Abraham made a great feast the day that Isaac was weaned.

chapters.zh: 当时，撒拉看见埃及人夏甲给亚伯拉罕所生的儿子戏笑，
chapters.en: And Sarah saw the son of Hagar the Egyptian, which she had born unto Abraham, mocking.

chapters.zh: 就对亚伯拉罕说：你把这使女和他儿子赶出去！因为这使女的儿子不可与我的儿子以撒一同承受产业。
chapters.en: Wherefore she said unto Abraham, Cast out this bondwoman and her son: for the son of this bondwoman shall not be heir with my son, with Isaac.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕因他儿子的缘故很忧愁。
chapters.en: And the thing was very grievous in Abraham's sight because of his son.

chapters.zh: 神对亚伯拉罕说：你不必为这童子和你的使女忧愁。凡撒拉对你说的话，你都该听从；因为从以撒生的，才要称为你的后裔。
chapters.en: And God said unto Abraham, Let it not be grievous in thy sight because of the lad, and because of thy bondwoman; in all that Sarah hath said unto thee, hearken unto her voice; for in Isaac shall thy seed be called.

chapters.zh: 至于使女的儿子，我也必使他的后裔成立一国，因为他是你所生的。
chapters.en: And also of the son of the bondwoman will I make a nation, because he thy seed.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕清早起来，拿饼和一皮袋水，给了夏甲，搭在他的肩上，又把孩子交给他，打发他走。夏甲就走了，在别是巴的旷野走迷了路。
chapters.en: And Abraham rose up early in the morning, and took bread, and a bottle of water, and gave unto Hagar, putting on her shoulder, and the child, and sent her away: and she departed, and wandered in the wilderness of Beersheba.

chapters.zh: 皮袋的水用尽了，夏甲就把孩子撇在小树底下，
chapters.en: And the water was spent in the bottle, and she cast the child under one of the shrubs.

chapters.zh: 自己走开约有一箭之远，相对而坐，说：我不忍见孩子死，就相对而坐，放声大哭。
chapters.en: And she went, and sat her down over against a good way off, as it were a bowshot: for she said, Let me not see the death of the child. And she sat over against , and lift up her voice, and wept.

chapters.zh: 神听见童子的声音；神的使者从天上呼叫夏甲说：夏甲，你为何这样呢？不要害怕，神已经听见童子的声音了。
chapters.en: And God heard the voice of the lad; and the angel of God called to Hagar out of heaven, and said unto her, What aileth thee, Hagar? fear not; for God hath heard the voice of the lad where he .

chapters.zh: 起来！把童子抱在怀 ( 原文作手 ) 中，我必使他的后裔成为大国。
chapters.en: Arise, lift up the lad, and hold him in thine hand; for I will make him a great nation.

chapters.zh: 神使夏甲的眼睛明亮，他就看见一口水井，便去将皮袋盛满了水，给童子喝。
chapters.en: And God opened her eyes, and she saw a well of water; and she went, and filled the bottle with water, and gave the lad drink.

chapters.zh: 神保佑童子，他就渐长，住在旷野，成了弓箭手。
chapters.en: And God was with the lad; and he grew, and dwelt in the wilderness, and became an archer.

chapters.zh: 他住在巴兰的旷野；他母亲从埃及地给他娶了一个妻子。
chapters.en: And he dwelt in the wilderness of Paran: and his mother took him a wife out of the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 当那时候，亚比米勒同他军长非各对亚伯拉罕说：凡你所行的事都有神的保佑。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at that time, that Abimelech and Phichol the chief captain of his host spake unto Abraham, saying, God with thee in all that thou doest:

chapters.zh: 我愿你如今在这里指著神对我起誓，不要欺负我与我的儿子，并我的子孙。我怎样厚待了你，你也要照样厚待我与你所寄居这地的民。
chapters.en: Now therefore swear unto me here by God that thou wilt not deal falsely with me, nor with my son, nor with my son's son: according to the kindness that I have done unto thee, thou shalt do unto me, and to the land wherein thou hast sojourned.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕说：我情愿起誓。
chapters.en: And Abraham said, I will swear.

chapters.zh: 从前，亚比米勒的仆人霸占了一口水井，亚伯拉罕为这事指责亚比米勒。
chapters.en: And Abraham reproved Abimelech because of a well of water, which Abimelech's servants had violently taken away.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒说：谁做这事，我不知道，你也没有告诉我，今日我才听见了。
chapters.en: And Abimelech said, I wot not who hath done this thing: neither didst thou tell me, neither yet heard I , but to day.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕把羊和牛给了亚比米勒，二人就彼此立约。
chapters.en: And Abraham took sheep and oxen, and gave them unto Abimelech; and both of them made a covenant.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕把七只母羊羔另放在一处。
chapters.en: And Abraham set seven ewe lambs of the flock by themselves.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒问亚伯拉罕说：你把这七只母羊羔另放在一处，是甚么意思呢？
chapters.en: And Abimelech said unto Abraham, What these seven ewe lambs which thou hast set by themselves?

chapters.zh: 他说：你要从我手里受这七只母羊羔，作我挖这口井的证据。
chapters.en: And he said, For seven ewe lambs shalt thou take of my hand, that they may be a witness unto me, that I have digged this well.

chapters.zh: 所以他给那地方起名叫别是巴，因为他们二人在那里起了誓。( 别是巴就是盟誓的井的意思 )
chapters.en: Wherefore he called that place Beersheba; because there they sware both of them.

chapters.zh: 他们在别是巴立了约，亚比米勒就同他军长非各起身回非利士地去了。
chapters.en: Thus they made a covenant at Beersheba: then Abimelech rose up, and Phichol the chief captain of his host, and they returned into the land of the Philistines.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕在别是巴栽上一棵垂丝柳树，又在那里求告耶和华 ─ 永生神的名。
chapters.en: And planted a grove in Beersheba, and called there on the name of the LORD, the everlasting God.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕在非利士人的地寄居了多日。
chapters.en: And Abraham sojourned in the Philistines' land many days.

chapters.zh: 这些事以后，神要试验亚伯拉罕，就呼叫他说：亚伯拉罕！他说：我在这里。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after these things, that God did tempt Abraham, and said unto him, Abraham: and he said, Behold, I .

chapters.zh: 神说：你带著你的儿子，就是你独生的儿子，你所爱的以撒，往摩利亚地去，在我所要指示你的山上，把他献为燔祭。
chapters.en: And he said, Take now thy son, thine only Isaac, whom thou lovest, and get thee into the land of Moriah; and offer him there for a burnt offering upon one of the mountains which I will tell thee of.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕清早起来，备上驴，带著两个仆人和他儿子以撒，也劈好了燔祭的柴，就起身往神所指示他的地方去了。
chapters.en: And Abraham rose up early in the morning, and saddled his ass, and took two of his young men with him, and Isaac his son, and clave the wood for the burnt offering, and rose up, and went unto the place of which God had told him.

chapters.zh: 到了第三日，亚伯拉罕举目远远的看见那地方。
chapters.en: Then on the third day Abraham lifted up his eyes, and saw the place afar off.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕对他的仆人说：你们和驴在此等候，我与童子往那里去拜一拜，就回到你们这里来。
chapters.en: And Abraham said unto his young men, Abide ye here with the ass; and I and the lad will go yonder and worship, and come again to you.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕把燔祭的柴放在他儿子以撒身上，自己手里拿著火与刀；于是二人同行。
chapters.en: And Abraham took the wood of the burnt offering, and laid upon Isaac his son; and he took the fire in his hand, and a knife; and they went both of them together.

chapters.zh: 以撒对他父亲亚伯拉罕说：父亲哪！亚伯拉罕说：我儿，我在这里。以撒说：请看，火与柴都有了，但燔祭的羊羔在那里呢？
chapters.en: And Isaac spake unto Abraham his father, and said, My father: and he said, Here I, my son. And he said, Behold the fire and the wood: but where the lamb for a burnt offering?

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕说：我儿，神必自己预备作燔祭的羊羔。于是二人同行。
chapters.en: And Abraham said, My son, God will provide himself a lamb for a burnt offering: so they went both of them together.

chapters.zh: 他们到了神所指示的地方，亚伯拉罕在那里筑坛，把柴摆好，捆绑他的儿子以撒，放在坛的柴上。
chapters.en: And they came to the place which God had told him of; and Abraham built an altar there, and laid the wood in order, and bound Isaac his son, and laid him on the altar upon the wood.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕就伸手拿刀，要杀他的儿子。
chapters.en: And Abraham stretched forth his hand, and took the knife to slay his son.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的使者从天上呼叫他说：亚伯拉罕！亚伯拉罕！他说：我在这里。
chapters.en: And the angel of the LORD called unto him out of heaven, and said, Abraham, Abraham: and he said, Here I.

chapters.zh: 天使说：你不可在这童子身上下手。一点不可害他！现在我知道你是敬畏神的了；因为你没有将你的儿子，就是你独生的儿子，留下不给我。
chapters.en: And he said, Lay not thine hand upon the lad, neither do thou any thing unto him: for now I know that thou fearest God, seeing thou hast not withheld thy son, thine only from me.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕举目观看，不料，有一只公羊，两角扣在稠密的小树中，亚伯拉罕就取了那只公羊来，献为燔祭，代替他的儿子。
chapters.en: And Abraham lifted up his eyes, and looked, and behold behind a ram caught in a thicket by his horns: and Abraham went and took the ram, and offered him up for a burnt offering in the stead of his son.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕给那地方起名叫耶和华以勒 ( 意思就是耶和华必预备的意思 )，直到今日人还说：在耶和华的山上必有预备。
chapters.en: And Abraham called the name of that place Jehovahjireh: as it is said this day, In the mount of the LORD it shall be seen.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的使者第二次从天上呼叫亚伯拉罕说：
chapters.en: And the angel of the LORD called unto Abraham out of heaven the second time,

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：你既行了这事，不留下你的儿子，就是你独生的儿子，我便指著自己起誓说：
chapters.en: And said, By myself have I sworn, saith the LORD, for because thou hast done this thing, and hast not withheld thy son, thine only :

chapters.zh: 论福，我必赐大福给你；论子孙，我必叫你的子孙多起来，如同天上的星，海边的沙。你子孙必得著仇敌的城门，
chapters.en: That in blessing I will bless thee, and in multiplying I will multiply thy seed as the stars of the heaven, and as the sand which upon the sea shore; and thy seed shall possess the gate of his enemies;

chapters.zh: 并且地上万国都必因你的后裔得福，因为你听从了我的话。
chapters.en: And in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed; because thou hast obeyed my voice.

chapters.zh: 于是亚伯拉罕回到他仆人那里，他们一同起身往别是巴去，亚伯拉罕就住在别是巴。
chapters.en: So Abraham returned unto his young men, and they rose up and went together to Beersheba; and Abraham dwelt at Beersheba.

chapters.zh: 这事以后，有人告诉亚伯拉罕说：密迦给你兄弟拿鹤生了几个儿子，
chapters.en: And it came to pass after these things, that it was told Abraham, saying, Behold, Milcah, she hath also born children unto thy brother Nahor;

chapters.zh: 长子是乌斯，他的兄弟是布斯和亚兰的父亲基母利，
chapters.en: Huz his firstborn, and Buz his brother, and Kemuel the father of Aram,

chapters.zh: 并基薛、哈琐、必达、益拉、彼土利（彼土利生利百加）。
chapters.en: And Chesed, and Hazo, and Pildash, and Jidlaph, and Bethuel.

chapters.zh: 这八个人都是密迦给亚伯拉罕的兄弟拿鹤生的。
chapters.en: And Bethuel begat Rebekah: these eight Milcah did bear to Nahor, Abraham's brother.

chapters.zh: 拿鹤的妾名叫流玛，生了提八、迦含、他辖，和玛迦。
chapters.en: And his concubine, whose name Reumah, she bare also Tebah, and Gaham, and Thahash, and Maachah.

chapters.zh: 撒拉享寿一百二十七岁，这是撒拉一生的岁数。
chapters.en: And Sarah was an hundred and seven and twenty years old: the years of the life of Sarah.

chapters.zh: 撒拉死在迦南地的基列亚巴，就是希伯仑。亚伯拉罕为他哀恸哭号。
chapters.en: And Sarah died in Kirjatharba; the same Hebron in the land of Canaan: and Abraham came to mourn for Sarah, and to weep for her.

chapters.zh: 后来亚伯拉罕从死人面前起来，对赫人说：
chapters.en: And Abraham stood up from before his dead, and spake unto the sons of Heth, saying,

chapters.zh: 我在你们中间是外人，是寄居的。求你们在这里给我一块地，我好埋葬我的死人，使他不在我眼前。
chapters.en: I a stranger and a sojourner with you: give me a possession of a buryingplace with you, that I may bury my dead out of my sight.

chapters.zh: 赫人回答亚伯拉罕说：
chapters.en: And the children of Heth answered Abraham, saying unto him,

chapters.zh: 我主请听。你在我们中间是一位尊大的王子，只管在我们最好的坟地里埋葬你的死人；我们没有一人不容你在他的坟地里埋葬你的死人。
chapters.en: Hear us, my lord: thou a mighty prince among us: in the choice of our sepulchres bury thy dead; none of us shall withhold from thee his sepulchre, but that thou mayest bury thy dead.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕就起来，向那地的赫人下拜，
chapters.en: And Abraham stood up, and bowed himself to the people of the land, to the children of Heth.

chapters.zh: 对他们说：你们若有意叫我埋葬我的死人，使他不在我眼前，就请听我的话，为我求琐辖的儿子以弗仑，
chapters.en: And he communed with them, saying, If it be your mind that I should bury my dead out of my sight; hear me, and intreat for me to Ephron the son of Zohar,

chapters.zh: 把田头上那麦比拉洞给我；他可以按著足价卖给我，作我在你们中间的坟地。
chapters.en: That he may give me the cave of Machpelah, which he hath, which in the end of his field; for as much money as it is worth he shall give it me for a possession of a buryingplace amongst you.

chapters.zh: 当时以弗仑正坐在赫人中间。于是，赫人以弗仑在城门出入的赫人面前对亚伯拉罕说：
chapters.en: And Ephron dwelt among the children of Heth: and Ephron the Hittite answered Abraham in the audience of the children of Heth, of all that went in at the gate of his city, saying,

chapters.zh: 不然，我主请听。我送给你这块田，连田间的洞也送给你，在我同族的人面前都给你，可以埋葬你的死人。
chapters.en: Nay, my lord, hear me: the field give I thee, and the cave that therein, I give it thee; in the presence of the sons of my people give I it thee: bury thy dead.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕就在那地的人民面前下拜，
chapters.en: And Abraham bowed down himself before the people of the land.

chapters.zh: 在他们面前对以弗仑说：你若应允，请听我的话。我要把田价给你，求你收下，我就在那里埋葬我的死人。
chapters.en: And he spake unto Ephron in the audience of the people of the land, saying, But if thou , I pray thee, hear me: I will give thee money for the field; take of me, and I will bury my dead there.

chapters.zh: 以弗仑回答亚伯拉罕说：
chapters.en: And Ephron answered Abraham, saying unto him,

chapters.zh: 我主请听。值四百舍客勒银子的一块田，在你我中间还算甚么呢？只管埋葬你的死人罢！
chapters.en: My lord, hearken unto me: the land four hundred shekels of silver; what that betwixt me and thee? bury therefore thy dead.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕听从了以弗仑，照著他在赫人面前所说的话，把买卖通用的银子平了四百舍客勒给以弗仑。
chapters.en: And Abraham hearkened unto Ephron; and Abraham weighed to Ephron the silver, which he had named in the audience of the sons of Heth, four hundred shekels of silver, current with the merchant.

chapters.zh: 于是，麦比拉、幔利前、以弗仑的那块田和其中的洞，并田间四围的树木，
chapters.en: And the field of Ephron, which in Machpelah, which before Mamre, the field, and the cave which therein, and all the trees that in the field, that in all the borders round about, were made sure

chapters.zh: 都定准归与亚伯拉罕，乃是他在赫人面前并城门出入的人面前买妥的。
chapters.en: Unto Abraham for a possession in the presence of the children of Heth, before all that went in at the gate of his city.

chapters.zh: 此后，亚伯拉罕把他妻子撒拉埋葬在迦南地幔利前的麦比拉田间的洞里。〈 幔利就是希伯仑 〉。
chapters.en: And after this, Abraham buried Sarah his wife in the cave of the field of Machpelah before Mamre: the same Hebron in the land of Canaan.

chapters.zh: 从此，那块田和田间的洞就藉著赫人定准归与亚伯拉罕作坟地。
chapters.en: And the field, and the cave that therein, were made sure unto Abraham for a possession of a buryingplace by the sons of Heth.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕年纪老迈，向来在一切事上耶和华都赐福给他。
chapters.en: And Abraham was old, well stricken in age: and the LORD had blessed Abraham in all things.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕对管理他全业最老的仆人说：请你把手放在我大腿底下。
chapters.en: And Abraham said unto his eldest servant of his house, that ruled over all that he had, Put, I pray thee, thy hand under my thigh:

chapters.zh: 我要叫你指著耶和华 ─ 天地的主起誓，不要为我儿子娶这迦南地中的女子为妻。
chapters.en: And I will make thee swear by the LORD, the God of heaven, and the God of the earth, that thou shalt not take a wife unto my son of the daughters of the Canaanites, among whom I dwell:

chapters.zh: 你要往我本地本族去，为我的儿子以撒娶一个妻子。
chapters.en: But thou shalt go unto my country, and to my kindred, and take a wife unto my son Isaac.

chapters.zh: 仆人对他说：倘若女子不肯跟我到这地方来，我必须将你的儿子带回你原出之地么？
chapters.en: And the servant said unto him, Peradventure the woman will not be willing to follow me unto this land: must I needs bring thy son again unto the land from whence thou camest?

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕对他说：你要谨慎，不要带我的儿子回那里去。
chapters.en: And Abraham said unto him, Beware thou that thou bring not my son thither again.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 天上的主曾带领我离开父家和本族的地，对我说话，向我起誓说：我要将这地赐给你的后裔。他必差遣使者在你面前，你就可以从那里为我儿子娶一个妻子。
chapters.en: The LORD God of heaven, which took me from my father's house, and from the land of my kindred, and which spake unto me, and that sware unto me, saying, Unto thy seed will I give this land; he shall send his angel before thee, and thou shalt take a wife unto my son from thence.

chapters.zh: 倘若女子不肯跟你来，我使你起的誓就与你无干了，只是不可带我的儿子回那里去。
chapters.en: And if the woman will not be willing to follow thee, then thou shalt be clear from this my oath: only bring not my son thither again.

chapters.zh: 仆人就把手放在他主人亚伯拉罕的大腿底下，为这事向他起誓。
chapters.en: And the servant put his hand under the thigh of Abraham his master, and sware to him concerning that matter.

chapters.zh: 那仆人从他主人的骆驼里取了十匹骆驼，并带些他主人各样的财物，起身往米所波大米去，到了拿鹤的城。
chapters.en: And the servant took ten camels of the camels of his master, and departed; for all the goods of his master in his hand: and he arose, and went to Mesopotamia, unto the city of Nahor.

chapters.zh: 天将晚，众女子出来打水的时候，他便叫骆驼跪在城外的水井那里。
chapters.en: And he made his camels to kneel down without the city by a well of water at the time of the evening, the time that women go out to draw .

chapters.zh: 他说：耶和华 ─ 我主人亚伯拉罕的神阿，求你施恩给我主人亚伯拉罕，使我今日遇见好机会。
chapters.en: And he said, O LORD God of my master Abraham, I pray thee, send me good speed this day, and shew kindness unto my master Abraham.

chapters.zh: 我现今站在井旁，城内居民的女子们正出来打水。
chapters.en: Behold, I stand by the well of water; and the daughters of the men of the city come out to draw water:

chapters.zh: 我向那一个女子说：请你拿下水瓶来，给我水喝，他若说：请喝！我也给你的骆驼喝，愿那女子就作你所预定给你仆人以撒的妻。这样，我便知道你施恩给我主人了。
chapters.en: And let it come to pass, that the damsel to whom I shall say, Let down thy pitcher, I pray thee, that I may drink; and she shall say, Drink, and I will give thy camels drink also: she thou hast appointed for thy servant Isaac; and thereby shall I know that thou hast shewed kindness unto my master.

chapters.zh: 话还没有说完，不料，利百加肩头上扛著水瓶出来。利百加是彼土利所生的；彼土利是亚伯拉罕兄弟拿鹤妻子密迦的儿子。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, before he had done speaking, that, behold, Rebekah came out, who was born to Bethuel, son of Milcah, the wife of Nahor, Abraham's brother, with her pitcher upon her shoulder.

chapters.zh: 那女子容貌极其俊美，还是处女，也未曾有人亲近他。他下到井旁，打满了瓶，又上来。
chapters.en: And the damsel very fair to look upon, a virgin, neither had any man known her: and she went down to the well, and filled her pitcher, and came up.

chapters.zh: 仆人跑上前去迎著他，说：求你将瓶里的水给我一点喝。
chapters.en: And the servant ran to meet her, and said, Let me, I pray thee, drink a little water of thy pitcher.

chapters.zh: 女子说：我主请喝！就急忙拿下瓶来，托在手上给他喝。
chapters.en: And she said, Drink, my lord: and she hasted, and let down her pitcher upon her hand, and gave him drink.

chapters.zh: 女子给他喝了，就说：我再为你的骆驼打水，叫骆驼也喝足。
chapters.en: And when she had done giving him drink, she said, I will draw for thy camels also, until they have done drinking.

chapters.zh: 他就急忙把瓶里的水倒在槽里，又跑到井旁打水，就为所有的骆驼打上水来。
chapters.en: And she hasted, and emptied her pitcher into the trough, and ran again unto the well to draw , and drew for all his camels.

chapters.zh: 那人定睛看他，一句话也不说，要晓得耶和华赐他通达的道路没有。
chapters.en: And the man wondering at her held his peace, to wit whether the LORD had made his journey prosperous or not.

chapters.zh: 骆驼喝足了，那人就拿一个金环，重半舍客勒，两个金镯，重十舍客勒，给了那女子，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as the camels had done drinking, that the man took a golden earring of half a shekel weight, and two bracelets for her hands of ten weight of gold;

chapters.zh: 说：请告诉我，你是谁的女儿？你父亲家里有我们住宿的地方没有？
chapters.en: And said, Whose daughter thou? tell me, I pray thee: is there room thy father's house for us to lodge in?

chapters.zh: 女子说：我是密迦与拿鹤之子彼土利的女儿；
chapters.en: And she said unto him, I the daughter of Bethuel the son of Milcah, which she bare unto Nahor.

chapters.zh: 又说：我们家里足有粮草，也有住宿的地方。
chapters.en: She said moreover unto him, We have both straw and provender enough, and room to lodge in.

chapters.zh: 那人就低头向耶和华下拜，
chapters.en: And the man bowed down his head, and worshipped the LORD.

chapters.zh: 说：耶和华 ─ 我主人亚伯拉罕的神是应当称颂的，因他不断地以慈爱诚实待我主人。至于我，耶和华在路上引领我，直走到我主人的兄弟家里。
chapters.en: And he said, Blessed the LORD God of my master Abraham, who hath not left destitute my master of his mercy and his truth: I in the way, the LORD led me to the house of my master's brethren.

chapters.zh: 女子跑回去，照著这些话告诉他母亲和他家里的人。
chapters.en: And the damsel ran, and told her mother's house these things.

chapters.zh: 利百加有一个哥哥，名叫拉班，看见金环，又看见金镯在他妹子的手上，并听见他妹子利百加的话，说那人对我如此如此说。拉班就跑出来往井旁去，到那人跟前，见他仍站在骆驼旁边的井旁那里，
chapters.en: And Rebekah had a brother, and his name Laban: and Laban ran out unto the man, unto the well.

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when he saw the earring and bracelets upon his sister's hands, and when he heard the words of Rebekah his sister, saying, Thus spake the man unto me; that he came unto the man; and, behold, he stood by the camels at the well.

chapters.zh: 便对他说：你这蒙耶和华赐福的，请进来，为甚么站在外边？我已经收拾了房屋，也为骆驼预备了地方。
chapters.en: And he said, Come in, thou blessed of the LORD; wherefore standest thou without? for I have prepared the house, and room for the camels.

chapters.zh: 那人就进了拉班的家。拉班卸了骆驼，用草料喂上，拿水给那人和跟随的人洗脚，
chapters.en: And the man came into the house: and he ungirded his camels, and gave straw and provender for the camels, and water to wash his feet, and the men's feet that with him.

chapters.zh: 把饭摆在他面前，叫他吃，他却说：我不吃，等我说明白我的事情再吃。拉班说：请说。
chapters.en: And there was set before him to eat: but he said, I will not eat, until I have told mine errand. And he said, Speak on.

chapters.zh: 他说：我是亚伯拉罕的仆人。
chapters.en: And he said, I Abraham's servant.

chapters.zh: 耶和华大大地赐福给我主人，使他昌大，又赐给他羊群、牛群、金银、仆婢、骆驼，和驴。
chapters.en: And the LORD hath blessed my master greatly; and he is become great: and he hath given him flocks, and herds, and silver, and gold, and menservants, and maidservants, and camels, and asses.

chapters.zh: 我主人的妻子撒拉年老的时候给我主人生了一个儿子；我主人也将一切所有的都给了这个儿子。
chapters.en: And Sarah my master's wife bare a son to my master when she was old: and unto him hath he given all that he hath.

chapters.zh: 我主人叫我起誓说：你不要为我儿子娶迦南地的女子为妻。
chapters.en: And my master made me swear, saying, Thou shalt not take a wife to my son of the daughters of the Canaanites, in whose land I dwell:

chapters.zh: 你要往我父家、我本族那里去，为我的儿子娶一个妻子。
chapters.en: But thou shalt go unto my father's house, and to my kindred, and take a wife unto my son.

chapters.zh: 我对我主人说：恐怕女子不肯跟我来。
chapters.en: And I said unto my master, Peradventure the woman will not follow me.

chapters.zh: 他就说：我所事奉的耶和华必要差遣他的使者与你同去，叫你的道路通达，你就得以在我父家、我本族那里，给我的儿子娶一个妻子。
chapters.en: And he said unto me, The LORD, before whom I walk, will send his angel with thee, and prosper thy way; and thou shalt take a wife for my son of my kindred, and of my father's house:

chapters.zh: 只要你到了我本族那里，我使你起的誓就与你无干。他们若不把女子交给你，我使你起的誓也与你无干。
chapters.en: Then shalt thou be clear from my oath, when thou comest to my kindred; and if they give not thee , thou shalt be clear from my oath.

chapters.zh: 我今日到了井旁，便说：耶和华 ─ 我主人亚伯拉罕的神阿，愿你叫我所行的道路通达。
chapters.en: And I came this day unto the well, and said, O LORD God of my master Abraham, if now thou do prosper my way which I go:

chapters.zh: 我如今站在井旁，对那一个出来打水的女子说：请你把你瓶里的水给我一点喝；
chapters.en: Behold, I stand by the well of water; and it shall come to pass, that when the virgin cometh forth to draw , and I say to her, Give me, I pray thee, a little water of thy pitcher to drink;

chapters.zh: 他若说：你只管喝，我也为你的骆驼打水；愿那女子就作耶和华给我主人儿子所预定的妻。
chapters.en: And she say to me, Both drink thou, and I will also draw for thy camels: the same the woman whom the LORD hath appointed out for my master's son.

chapters.zh: 我心里的话还没有说完，利百加就出来，肩头上扛著水瓶，下到井旁打水。我便对他说：请你给我水喝。
chapters.en: And before I had done speaking in mine heart, behold, Rebekah came forth with her pitcher on her shoulder; and she went down unto the well, and drew : and I said unto her, Let me drink, I pray thee.

chapters.zh: 他就急忙从肩头上拿下瓶来，说：请喝！我也给你的骆驼喝。我便喝了；他又给我的骆驼喝了。
chapters.en: And she made haste, and let down her pitcher from her , and said, Drink, and I will give thy camels drink also: so I drank, and she made the camels drink also.

chapters.zh: 我问他说：你是谁的女儿？他说：我是密迦与拿鹤之子彼土利的女儿。我就把环子戴在他鼻子上，把镯子戴在他两手上。
chapters.en: And I asked her, and said, Whose daughter thou? And she said, The daughter of Bethuel, Nahor's son, whom Milcah bare unto him: and I put the earring upon her face, and the bracelets upon her hands.

chapters.zh: 随后我低头向耶和华下拜，称颂耶和华 ─ 我主人亚伯拉罕的神；因为他引导我走合式的道路，使我得著我主人兄弟的孙女，给我主人的儿子为妻。
chapters.en: And I bowed down my head, and worshipped the LORD, and blessed the LORD God of my master Abraham, which had led me in the right way to take my master's brother's daughter unto his son.

chapters.zh: 现在你们若愿以慈爱诚实待我主人，就告诉我；若不然，也告诉我，使我可以或向左，或向右。
chapters.en: And now if ye will deal kindly and truly with my master, tell me: and if not, tell me; that I may turn to the right hand, or to the left.

chapters.zh: 拉班和彼土利回答说：这事乃出于耶和华，我们不能向你说好说歹。
chapters.en: Then Laban and Bethuel answered and said, The thing proceedeth from the LORD: we cannot speak unto thee bad or good.

chapters.zh: 看哪，利百加在你面前，可以将他带去，照著耶和华所说的，给你主人的儿子为妻。
chapters.en: Behold, Rebekah before thee, take , and go, and let her be thy master's son's wife, as the LORD hath spoken.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕的仆人听见他们这话，就向耶和华俯伏在地。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that, when Abraham's servant heard their words, he worshipped the LORD, to the earth.

chapters.zh: 当下仆人拿出金器、银器，和衣服送给利百加，又将宝物送给他哥哥和他母亲。
chapters.en: And the servant brought forth jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment, and gave to Rebekah: he gave also to her brother and to her mother precious things.

chapters.zh: 仆人和跟从他的人吃了喝了，住了一夜。早晨起来，仆人就说：请打发我回我主人那里去罢。
chapters.en: And they did eat and drink, he and the men that with him, and tarried all night; and they rose up in the morning, and he said, Send me away unto my master.

chapters.zh: 利百加的哥哥和他母亲说：让女子同我们再住几天，至少十天，然后他可以去。
chapters.en: And her brother and her mother said, Let the damsel abide with us days, at the least ten; after that she shall go.

chapters.zh: 仆人说：耶和华既赐给我通达的道路，你们不要耽误我，请打发我走，回我主人那里去罢。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Hinder me not, seeing the LORD hath prospered my way; send me away that I may go to my master.

chapters.zh: 他们说：我们把女子叫来问问他，
chapters.en: And they said, We will call the damsel, and enquire at her mouth.

chapters.zh: 就叫了利百加来，问他说：你和这人同去么？利百加说：我去。
chapters.en: And they called Rebekah, and said unto her, Wilt thou go with this man? And she said, I will go.

chapters.zh: 于是他们打发妹子利百加和他的乳母，同亚伯拉罕的仆人，并跟从仆人的，都走了。
chapters.en: And they sent away Rebekah their sister, and her nurse, and Abraham's servant, and his men.

chapters.zh: 他们就给利百加祝福说：我们的妹子阿，愿你作千万人的母！愿你的后裔得著仇敌的城门！
chapters.en: And they blessed Rebekah, and said unto her, Thou our sister, be thou of thousands of millions, and let thy seed possess the gate of those which hate them.

chapters.zh: 利百加和他的使女们起来，骑上骆驼，跟著那仆人，仆人就带著利百加走了。
chapters.en: And Rebekah arose, and her damsels, and they rode upon the camels, and followed the man: and the servant took Rebekah, and went his way.

chapters.zh: 那时，以撒住在南地，刚从庇耳 • 拉海 • 莱回来。
chapters.en: And Isaac came from the way of the well Lahairoi; for he dwelt in the south country.

chapters.zh: 天将晚，以撒出来在田间默想，举目一看，见来了些骆驼。
chapters.en: And Isaac went out to meditate in the field at the eventide: and he lifted up his eyes, and saw, and, behold, the camels coming.

chapters.zh: 利百加举目看见以撒，就急忙下了骆驼，
chapters.en: And Rebekah lifted up her eyes, and when she saw Isaac, she lighted off the camel.

chapters.zh: 问那仆人说：这田间走来迎接我们的是谁？仆人说：是我的主人。利百加就拿帕子蒙上脸。
chapters.en: For she said unto the servant, What man this that walketh in the field to meet us? And the servant said, It my master: therefore she took a vail, and covered herself.

chapters.zh: 仆人就将所办的一切事都告诉以撒。
chapters.en: And the servant told Isaac all things that he had done.

chapters.zh: 以撒便领利百加进了他母亲撒拉的帐棚，娶了他为妻，并且爱他。以撒自从他母亲不在了，这才得了安慰。
chapters.en: And Isaac brought her into his mother Sarah's tent, and took Rebekah, and she became his wife; and he loved her: and Isaac was comforted after his mother's .

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕又娶了一妻，名叫基土拉。
chapters.en: Then again Abraham took a wife, and her name Keturah.

chapters.zh: 基土拉给他生了心兰、约珊、米但、米甸、伊施巴，和书亚。
chapters.en: And she bare him Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah.

chapters.zh: 约珊生了示巴和底但。底但的子孙是亚书利族、利都是族，和利乌米族。
chapters.en: And Jokshan begat Sheba, and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.

chapters.zh: 米甸的儿子是以法、以弗、哈诺、亚比大，和以勒大。这都是基土拉的子孙。
chapters.en: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these the children of Keturah.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕将一切所有的都给了以撒。
chapters.en: And Abraham gave all that he had unto Isaac.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕把财物分给他庶出的众子，趁著自己还在世的时候打发他们离开他的儿子以撒，往东方去。
chapters.en: But unto the sons of the concubines, which Abraham had, Abraham gave gifts, and sent them away from Isaac his son, while he yet lived, eastward, unto the east country.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕一生的年日是一百七十五岁。
chapters.en: And these the days of the years of Abraham's life which he lived, an hundred threescore and fifteen years.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕寿高年迈，气绝而死，归到他列祖 ( 原文作本民 ) 那里。
chapters.en: Then Abraham gave up the ghost, and died in a good old age, an old man, and full ; and was gathered to his people.

chapters.zh: 他两个儿子以撒、以实玛利把他埋葬在麦比拉洞里。这洞在幔利前、赫人琐辖的儿子以弗仑的田中，
chapters.en: And his sons Isaac and Ishmael buried him in the cave of Machpelah, in the field of Ephron the son of Zohar the Hittite, which before Mamre;

chapters.zh: 就是亚伯拉罕向赫人买的那块田。亚伯拉罕和他妻子撒拉都葬在那里。
chapters.en: The field which Abraham purchased of the sons of Heth: there was Abraham buried, and Sarah his wife.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕死了以后，神赐福给他的儿子以撒。以撒靠近庇耳拉海莱居住。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after the death of Abraham, that God blessed his son Isaac; and Isaac dwelt by the well Lahairoi.

chapters.zh: 撒拉的使女埃及人夏甲给亚伯拉罕所生的儿子是以实玛利。
chapters.en: Now these the generations of Ishmael, Abraham's son, whom Hagar the Egyptian, Sarah's handmaid, bare unto Abraham:

chapters.zh: 以实玛利儿子们的名字，按著他们的家谱记在下面。以实玛利的长子是尼拜约，又有基达、亚德别、米比衫、
chapters.en: And these the names of the sons of Ishmael, by their names, according to their generations: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebajoth; and Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

chapters.zh: 米施玛、度玛、玛撒、
chapters.en: And Mishma, and Dumah, and Massa,

chapters.zh: 哈大、提玛、伊突、拿非施、基底玛。
chapters.en: Hadar, and Tema, Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah:

chapters.zh: 这是以实玛利众子的名字，照著他们的村庄、营寨，作了十二族的族长。
chapters.en: These the sons of Ishmael, and these their names, by their towns, and by their castles; twelve princes according to their nations.

chapters.zh: 以实玛利享寿一百三十七岁，气绝而死，归到他列祖 ( 原文作本民 ) 那里。
chapters.en: And these the years of the life of Ishmael, an hundred and thirty and seven years: and he gave up the ghost and died; and was gathered unto his people.

chapters.zh: 他子孙的住处在他众弟兄东边，从哈腓拉直到埃及前的书珥，正在亚述的道上。
chapters.en: And they dwelt from Havilah unto Shur, that before Egypt, as thou goest toward Assyria: he died in the presence of all his brethren.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕的儿子以撒的后代记在下面。亚伯拉罕生以撒。
chapters.en: And these the generations of Isaac, Abraham's son: Abraham begat Isaac:

chapters.zh: 以撒娶利百加为妻的时候正四十岁。利百加是巴旦亚兰地的亚兰人彼土利的女儿，是亚兰人拉班的妹子。
chapters.en: And Isaac was forty years old when he took Rebekah to wife, the daughter of Bethuel the Syrian of Padanaram, the sister to Laban the Syrian.

chapters.zh: 以撒因他妻子不生育，就为他祈求耶和华；耶和华应允他的祈求，他的妻子利百加就怀了孕。
chapters.en: And Isaac intreated the LORD for his wife, because she barren: and the LORD was intreated of him, and Rebekah his wife conceived.

chapters.zh: 孩子们在他腹中彼此相争，他就说：若是这样，我为甚么活著呢 ( 或作我为甚么如此呢 )？他就去求问耶和华。
chapters.en: And the children struggled together within her; and she said, If so, why I thus? And she went to enquire of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对他说：两国在你腹内；两族要从你身上出来。这族必强于那族；将来大的要服事小的。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto her, Two nations in thy womb, and two manner of people shall be separated from thy bowels; and people shall be stronger than people; and the elder shall serve the younger.

chapters.zh: 生产的日子到了，腹中果然是双子。
chapters.en: And when her days to be delivered were fulfilled, behold, twins in her womb.

chapters.zh: 先产的身体发红，浑身有毛，如同皮衣，他们就给他起名叫以扫 ( 就是有毛的意思 )。
chapters.en: And the first came out red, all over like an hairy garment; and they called his name Esau.

chapters.zh: 随后又生了以扫的兄弟，手抓住以扫的脚跟，因此给他起名叫雅各 ( 就是抓住的意思 )。利百加生下两个儿子的时候，以撒年正六十岁。
chapters.en: And after that came his brother out, and his hand took hold on Esau's heel; and his name was called Jacob: and Isaac threescore years old when she bare them.

chapters.zh: 两个孩子渐渐长大，以扫善于打猎，常在田野；雅各为人安静，常住在帐棚里。
chapters.en: And the boys grew: and Esau was a cunning hunter, a man of the field; and Jacob a plain man, dwelling in tents.

chapters.zh: 以撒爱以扫，因为常吃他的野味；利百加却爱雅各。
chapters.en: And Isaac loved Esau, because he did eat of venison: but Rebekah loved Jacob.

chapters.zh: 有一天，雅各熬汤，以扫从田野回来累昏了。
chapters.en: And Jacob sod pottage: and Esau came from the field, and he faint:

chapters.zh: 以扫对雅各说：我累昏了，求你把这红汤给我喝。因此以扫又叫以东 ( 就是红的意思 )。
chapters.en: And Esau said to Jacob, Feed me, I pray thee, with that same red ; for I faint: therefore was his name called Edom.

chapters.zh: 雅各说：你今日把长子的名分卖给我罢。
chapters.en: And Jacob said, Sell me this day thy birthright.

chapters.zh: 以扫说：我将要死，这长子的名分于我有甚么益处呢？
chapters.en: And Esau said, Behold, I at the point to die: and what profit shall this birthright do to me?

chapters.zh: 雅各说：你今日对我起誓罢。以扫就对他起了誓，把长子的名分卖给雅各。
chapters.en: And Jacob said, Swear to me this day; and he sware unto him: and he sold his birthright unto Jacob.

chapters.zh: 于是雅各将饼和红豆汤给了以扫，以扫吃了喝了，便起来走了。这就是以扫轻看了他长子的名分。
chapters.en: Then Jacob gave Esau bread and pottage of lentiles; and he did eat and drink, and rose up, and went his way: thus Esau despised birthright.

chapters.zh: 在亚伯拉罕的日子，那地有一次饥荒；这时又有饥荒，以撒就往基拉耳去，到非利士人的王亚比米勒那里。
chapters.en: And there was a famine in the land, beside the first famine that was in the days of Abraham. And Isaac went unto Abimelech king of the Philistines unto Gerar.

chapters.zh: 耶和华向以撒显现，说：你不要下去，要住在我所指示你的地。
chapters.en: And the LORD appeared unto him, and said, Go not down into Egypt; dwell in the land which I shall tell thee of:

chapters.zh: 你寄居在这地，我必与你同在，赐福给你，因为我要将这些地都赐给你和你的后裔。我必坚定我向你父亚伯拉罕所起的誓。
chapters.en: Sojourn in this land, and I will be with thee, and will bless thee; for unto thee, and unto thy seed, I will give all these countries, and I will perform the oath which I sware unto Abraham thy father;

chapters.zh: 我要加增你的后裔，像天上的星那样多，又要将这些地都赐给你的后裔。并且地上万国必因你的后裔得福 ─
chapters.en: And I will make thy seed to multiply as the stars of heaven, and will give unto thy seed all these countries; and in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed;

chapters.zh: 都因亚伯拉罕听从我的话，遵守我的吩咐和我的命令、律例、法度。
chapters.en: Because that Abraham obeyed my voice, and kept my charge, my commandments, my statutes, and my laws.

chapters.zh: 以撒就住在基拉耳。
chapters.en: And Isaac dwelt in Gerar:

chapters.zh: 那地方的人问到他的妻子，他便说：那是我的妹子。原来他怕说：是我的妻子；他心里想：恐怕这地方的人为利百加的缘故杀我，因为他容貌俊美。
chapters.en: And the men of the place asked of his wife; and he said, She my sister: for he feared to say, my wife; lest, , the men of the place should kill me for Rebekah; because she fair to look upon.

chapters.zh: 他在那里住了许久。有一天，非利士人的王亚比米勒从窗户里往外观看，见以撒和他的妻子利百加戏玩。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when he had been there a long time, that Abimelech king of the Philistines looked out at a window, and saw, and, behold, Isaac sporting with Rebekah his wife.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒召了以撒来，对他说：他实在是你的妻子，你怎么说他是你的妹子？以撒说：我心里想，恐怕我因他而死。
chapters.en: And Abimelech called Isaac, and said, Behold, of a surety she thy wife: and how saidst thou, She my sister? And Isaac said unto him, Because I said, Lest I die for her.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒说：你向我们做的是甚么事呢？民中险些有人和你的妻同寝，把我们陷在罪里。
chapters.en: And Abimelech said, What this thou hast done unto us? one of the people might lightly have lien with thy wife, and thou shouldest have brought guiltiness upon us.

chapters.zh: 于是亚比米勒晓谕众民说：凡沾著这个人，或是他妻子的，定要把他治死。
chapters.en: And Abimelech charged all people, saying, He that toucheth this man or his wife shall surely be put to death.

chapters.zh: 以撒在那地耕种，那一年有百倍的收成。耶和华赐福给他，
chapters.en: Then Isaac sowed in that land, and received in the same year an hundredfold: and the LORD blessed him.

chapters.zh: 他就昌大，日增月盛，成了大富户。
chapters.en: And the man waxed great, and went forward, and grew until he became very great:

chapters.zh: 他有羊群牛群，又有许多仆人，非利士人就嫉妒他。
chapters.en: For he had possession of flocks, and possession of herds, and great store of servants: and the Philistines envied him.

chapters.zh: 当他父亲亚伯拉罕在世的日子，他父亲的仆人所挖的井，非利士人全都塞住，填满了土。
chapters.en: For all the wells which his father's servants had digged in the days of Abraham his father, the Philistines had stopped them, and filled them with earth.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒对以撒说：你离开我们去罢。因为你比我们强盛得多。
chapters.en: And Abimelech said unto Isaac, Go from us; for thou art much mightier than we.

chapters.zh: 以撒就离开那里，在基拉耳谷支搭帐棚，住在那里。
chapters.en: And Isaac departed thence, and pitched his tent in the valley of Gerar, and dwelt there.

chapters.zh: 当他父亲亚伯拉罕在世之日所挖的水井因非利士人在亚伯拉罕死后塞住了，以撒就重新挖出来，仍照他父亲所叫的叫那些井的名字。
chapters.en: And Isaac digged again the wells of water, which they had digged in the days of Abraham his father; for the Philistines had stopped them after the death of Abraham: and he called their names after the names by which his father had called them.

chapters.zh: 以撒的仆人在谷中挖井，便得了一口活水井。
chapters.en: And Isaac's servants digged in the valley, and found there a well of springing water.

chapters.zh: 基拉耳的牧人与以撒的牧人争竞，说：这水是我们的。以撒就给那井起名叫埃色 ( 就是相争的意思 )，因为他们和他相争。
chapters.en: And the herdmen of Gerar did strive with Isaac's herdmen, saying, The water ours: and he called the name of the well Esek; because they strove with him.

chapters.zh: 以撒的仆人又挖了一口井，他们又为这井争竞，因此以撒给这井起名叫西提拿 ( 就是为敌的意思 )。
chapters.en: And they digged another well, and strove for that also: and he called the name of it Sitnah.

chapters.zh: 以撒离开那里，又挖了一口井，他们不为这井争竞了，他就给那井起名叫利河伯 ( 就是宽阔的意思 )。他说：耶和华现在给我们宽阔之地，我们必在这地昌盛。
chapters.en: And he removed from thence, and digged another well; and for that they strove not: and he called the name of it Rehoboth; and he said, For now the LORD hath made room for us, and we shall be fruitful in the land.

chapters.zh: 以撒从那里上别是巴去。
chapters.en: And he went up from thence to Beersheba.

chapters.zh: 当夜耶和华向他显现，说：我是你父亲亚伯拉罕的神，不要惧怕！因为我与你同在，要赐福给你，并要为我仆人亚伯拉罕的缘故，使你的后裔繁多。
chapters.en: And the LORD appeared unto him the same night, and said, I the God of Abraham thy father: fear not, for I with thee, and will bless thee, and multiply thy seed for my servant Abraham's sake.

chapters.zh: 以撒就在那里筑了一座坛，求告耶和华的名，并且支搭帐棚；他的仆人便在那里挖了一口井。
chapters.en: And he builded an altar there, and called upon the name of the LORD, and pitched his tent there: and there Isaac's servants digged a well.

chapters.zh: 亚比米勒，同他的朋友亚户撒和他的军长非各，从基拉耳来见以撒。
chapters.en: Then Abimelech went to him from Gerar, and Ahuzzath one of his friends, and Phichol the chief captain of his army.

chapters.zh: 以撒对他们说：你们既然恨我，打发我走了，为甚么到我这里来呢？
chapters.en: And Isaac said unto them, Wherefore come ye to me, seeing ye hate me, and have sent me away from you?

chapters.zh: 他们说：我们明明的看见耶和华与你同在，便说，不如我们两下彼此起誓，彼此立约，
chapters.en: And they said, We saw certainly that the LORD was with thee: and we said, Let there be now an oath betwixt us, betwixt us and thee, and let us make a covenant with thee;

chapters.zh: 使你不害我们，正如我们未曾害你，一味的厚待你，并且打发你平平安安的走。你是蒙耶和华赐福的了。
chapters.en: That thou wilt do us no hurt, as we have not touched thee, and as we have done unto thee nothing but good, and have sent thee away in peace: thou now the blessed of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 以撒就为他们设摆筵席，他们便吃了喝了。
chapters.en: And he made them a feast, and they did eat and drink.

chapters.zh: 他们清早起来彼此起誓。以撒打发他们走，他们就平平安安的离开他走了。
chapters.en: And they rose up betimes in the morning, and sware one to another: and Isaac sent them away, and they departed from him in peace.

chapters.zh: 那一天，以撒的仆人来，将挖井的事告诉他说：我们得了水了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass the same day, that Isaac's servants came, and told him concerning the well which they had digged, and said unto him, We have found water.

chapters.zh: 他就给那井起名叫示巴；因此那城叫做别是巴，直到今日。
chapters.en: And he called it Shebah: therefore the name of the city Beersheba unto this day.

chapters.zh: 以扫四十岁的时候娶了赫人比利的女儿犹滴，与赫人以伦的女儿巴实抹为妻。
chapters.en: And Esau was forty years old when he took to wife Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite, and Bashemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite:

chapters.zh: 他们常使以撒和利百加心里愁烦。
chapters.en: Which were a grief of mind unto Isaac and to Rebekah.

chapters.zh: 以撒年老，眼睛昏花，不能看见，就叫了他大儿子以扫来，说：我儿。以扫说：我在这里。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that when Isaac was old, and his eyes were dim, so that he could not see, he called Esau his eldest son, and said unto him, My son: and he said unto him, Behold, I.

chapters.zh: 他说：我如今老了，不知道那一天死。
chapters.en: And he said, Behold now, I am old, I know not the day of my death:

chapters.zh: 现在拿你的器械，就是箭囊和弓，往田野去为我打猎，
chapters.en: Now therefore take, I pray thee, thy weapons, thy quiver and thy bow, and go out to the field, and take me venison;

chapters.zh: 照我所爱的做成美味，拿来给我吃，使我在未死之先给你祝福。
chapters.en: And make me savoury meat, such as I love, and bring to me, that I may eat; that my soul may bless thee before I die.

chapters.zh: 以撒对他儿子以扫说话，利百加也听见了。以扫往田野去打猎，要得野味带来。
chapters.en: And Rebekah heard when Isaac spake to Esau his son. And Esau went to the field to hunt venison, to bring .

chapters.zh: 利百加就对他儿子雅各说：我听见你父亲对你哥哥以扫说：
chapters.en: And Rebekah spake unto Jacob her son, saying, Behold, I heard thy father speak unto Esau thy brother, saying,

chapters.zh: 你去把野兽带来，做成美味给我吃，我好在未死之先，在耶和华面前给你祝福。
chapters.en: Bring me venison, and make me savoury meat, that I may eat, and bless thee before the LORD before my death.

chapters.zh: 现在，我儿，你要照著我所吩咐你的，听从我的话。
chapters.en: Now therefore, my son, obey my voice according to that which I command thee.

chapters.zh: 你到羊群里去，给我拿两只肥山羊羔来，我便照你父亲所爱的给他做成美味。
chapters.en: Go now to the flock, and fetch me from thence two good kids of the goats; and I will make them savoury meat for thy father, such as he loveth:

chapters.zh: 你拿到你父亲那里给他吃，使他在未死之先给你祝福。
chapters.en: And thou shalt bring to thy father, that he may eat, and that he may bless thee before his death.

chapters.zh: 雅各对他母亲利百加说：我哥哥以扫浑身是有毛的，我身上是光滑的；
chapters.en: And Jacob said to Rebekah his mother, Behold, Esau my brother a hairy man, and I a smooth man:

chapters.zh: 倘若我父亲摸著我，必以我为欺哄人的，我就招咒诅，不得祝福。
chapters.en: My father peradventure will feel me, and I shall seem to him as a deceiver; and I shall bring a curse upon me, and not a blessing.

chapters.zh: 他母亲对他说：我儿，你招的咒诅归到我身上；你只管听我的话，去把羊羔给我拿来。
chapters.en: And his mother said unto him, Upon me thy curse, my son: only obey my voice, and go fetch me .

chapters.zh: 他便去拿来，交给他母亲；他母亲就照他父亲所爱的做成美味。
chapters.en: And he went, and fetched, and brought to his mother: and his mother made savoury meat, such as his father loved.

chapters.zh: 利百加又把家里所存大儿子以扫上好的衣服给他小儿子雅各穿上，
chapters.en: And Rebekah took goodly raiment of her eldest son Esau, which with her in the house, and put them upon Jacob her younger son:

chapters.zh: 又用山羊羔皮包在雅各的手上和颈项的光滑处，
chapters.en: And she put the skins of the kids of the goats upon his hands, and upon the smooth of his neck:

chapters.zh: 就把所做的美味和饼交在他儿子雅各的手里。
chapters.en: And she gave the savoury meat and the bread, which she had prepared, into the hand of her son Jacob.

chapters.zh: 雅各到他父亲那里说：我父亲！他说：我在这里。我儿，你是谁？
chapters.en: And he came unto his father, and said, My father: and he said, Here I; who thou, my son?

chapters.zh: 雅各对他父亲说：我是你的长子以扫；我已照你所吩咐我的行了。请起来坐著，吃我的野味，好给我祝福。
chapters.en: And Jacob said unto his father, I Esau thy firstborn; I have done according as thou badest me: arise, I pray thee, sit and eat of my venison, that thy soul may bless me.

chapters.zh: 以撒对他儿子说：我儿，你如何找得这么快呢？他说：因为耶和华 ─ 你的神使我遇见好机会得著的。
chapters.en: And Isaac said unto his son, How that thou hast found so quickly, my son? And he said, Because the LORD thy God brought to me.

chapters.zh: 以撒对雅各说：我儿，你近前来，我摸摸你，知道你真是我的儿子以扫不是？
chapters.en: And Isaac said unto Jacob, Come near, I pray thee, that I may feel thee, my son, whether thou my very son Esau or not.

chapters.zh: 雅各就挨近他父亲以撒。以撒摸著他，说：声音是雅各的声音，手却是以扫的手。
chapters.en: And Jacob went near unto Isaac his father; and he felt him, and said, The voice Jacob's voice, but the hands the hands of Esau.

chapters.zh: 以撒就辨不出他来；因为他手上有毛，像他哥哥以扫的手一样，就给他祝福；
chapters.en: And he discerned him not, because his hands were hairy, as his brother Esau's hands: so he blessed him.

chapters.zh: 又说：你真是我儿子以扫么？他说：我是。
chapters.en: And he said, thou my very son Esau? And he said, I .

chapters.zh: 以撒说：你递给我，我好吃我儿子的野味，给你祝福。雅各就递给他，他便吃了，又拿酒给他，他也喝了。
chapters.en: And he said, Bring near to me, and I will eat of my son's venison, that my soul may bless thee. And he brought near to him, and he did eat: and he brought him wine, and he drank.

chapters.zh: 他父亲以撒对他说：我儿，你上前来与我亲嘴。
chapters.en: And his father Isaac said unto him, Come near now, and kiss me, my son.

chapters.zh: 他就上前与父亲亲嘴。他父亲一闻他衣服上的香气，就给他祝福，说：我儿的香气如同耶和华赐福之田地的香气一样。
chapters.en: And he came near, and kissed him: and he smelled the smell of his raiment, and blessed him, and said, See, the smell of my son as the smell of a field which the LORD hath blessed:

chapters.zh: 愿神赐你天上的甘露，地上的肥土，并许多五谷新酒。
chapters.en: Therefore God give thee of the dew of heaven, and the fatness of the earth, and plenty of corn and wine:

chapters.zh: 愿多民事奉你，多国跪拜你。愿你作你弟兄的主；你母亲的儿子向你跪拜。凡咒诅你的，愿他受咒诅；为你祝福的，愿他蒙福。
chapters.en: Let people serve thee, and nations bow down to thee: be lord over thy brethren, and let thy mother's sons bow down to thee: cursed every one that curseth thee, and blessed he that blesseth thee.

chapters.zh: 以撒为雅各祝福已毕，雅各从他父亲那里才出来，他哥哥以扫正打猎回来，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as soon as Isaac had made an end of blessing Jacob, and Jacob was yet scarce gone out from the presence of Isaac his father, that Esau his brother came in from his hunting.

chapters.zh: 也做了美味，拿来给他父亲，说：请父亲起来，吃你儿子的野味，好给我祝福。
chapters.en: And he also had made savoury meat, and brought it unto his father, and said unto his father, Let my father arise, and eat of his son's venison, that thy soul may bless me.

chapters.zh: 他父亲以撒对他说：你是谁？他说：我是你的长子以扫。
chapters.en: And Isaac his father said unto him, Who thou? And he said, I thy son, thy firstborn Esau.

chapters.zh: 以撒就大大地战兢，说：你未来之先，是谁得了野味拿来给我呢？我已经吃了，为他祝福；他将来也必蒙福。
chapters.en: And Isaac trembled very exceedingly, and said, Who? where he that hath taken venison, and brought me, and I have eaten of all before thou camest, and have blessed him? yea, he shall be blessed.

chapters.zh: 以扫听了他父亲的话，就放声痛哭，说：我父阿，求你也为我祝福！
chapters.en: And when Esau heard the words of his father, he cried with a great and exceeding bitter cry, and said unto his father, Bless me, me also, O my father.

chapters.zh: 以撒说：你兄弟已经用诡计来将你的福分夺去了。
chapters.en: And he said, Thy brother came with subtilty, and hath taken away thy blessing.

chapters.zh: 以扫说：他名雅各，岂不是正对么？因为他欺骗了我两次：他从前夺了我长子的名分，你看，他现在又夺了我的福分。以扫又说：你没有留下为我可祝的福么？
chapters.en: And he said, Is not he rightly named Jacob? for he hath supplanted me these two times: he took away my birthright; and, behold, now he hath taken away my blessing. And he said, Hast thou not reserved a blessing for me?

chapters.zh: 以撒回答以扫说：我已立他为你的主，使他的弟兄都给他作仆人，并赐他五谷新酒可以养生。我儿，现在我还能为你做甚么呢？
chapters.en: And Isaac answered and said unto Esau, Behold, I have made him thy lord, and all his brethren have I given to him for servants; and with corn and wine have I sustained him: and what shall I do now unto thee, my son?

chapters.zh: 以扫对他父亲说：父阿，你只有一样可祝的福么？我父阿，求你也为我祝福！以扫就放声而哭。
chapters.en: And Esau said unto his father, Hast thou but one blessing, my father? bless me, me also, O my father. And Esau lifted up his voice, and wept.

chapters.zh: 他父亲以撒说：地上的肥土必为你所住；天上的甘露必为你所得。
chapters.en: And Isaac his father answered and said unto him, Behold, thy dwelling shall be the fatness of the earth, and of the dew of heaven from above;

chapters.zh: 你必倚靠刀剑度日，又必事奉你的兄弟；到你强盛的时候，必从你颈项上挣开他的轭。
chapters.en: And by thy sword shalt thou live, and shalt serve thy brother; and it shall come to pass when thou shalt have the dominion, that thou shalt break his yoke from off thy neck.

chapters.zh: 以扫因他父亲给雅各祝的福，就怨恨雅各，心里说：为我父亲居丧的日子近了，到那时候，我要杀我的兄弟雅各。
chapters.en: And Esau hated Jacob because of the blessing wherewith his father blessed him: and Esau said in his heart, The days of mourning for my father are at hand; then will I slay my brother Jacob.

chapters.zh: 有人把利百加大儿子以扫的话告诉利百加，他就打发人去，叫了他小儿子雅各来，对他说：你哥哥以扫想要杀你，报仇雪恨。
chapters.en: And these words of Esau her elder son were told to Rebekah: and she sent and called Jacob her younger son, and said unto him, Behold, thy brother Esau, as touching thee, doth comfort himself, to kill thee.

chapters.zh: 现在，我儿，你要听我的话：起来，逃往哈兰、我哥哥拉班那里去，
chapters.en: Now therefore, my son, obey my voice; and arise, flee thou to Laban my brother to Haran;

chapters.zh: 同他住些日子，直等你哥哥的怒气消了。
chapters.en: And tarry with him a few days, until thy brother's fury turn away;

chapters.zh: 你哥哥向你消了怒气，忘了你向他所做的事，我便打发人去把你从那里带回来。为甚么一日丧你们二人呢？
chapters.en: Until thy brother's anger turn away from thee, and he forget which thou hast done to him: then I will send, and fetch thee from thence: why should I be deprived also of you both in one day?

chapters.zh: 利百加对以撒说：我因这赫人的女子连性命都厌烦了；倘若雅各也娶赫人的女子为妻，像这些一样，我活著还有甚么益处呢？
chapters.en: And Rebekah said to Isaac, I am weary of my life because of the daughters of Heth: if Jacob take a wife of the daughters of Heth, such as these of the daughters of the land, what good shall my life do me?

chapters.zh: 以撒叫了雅各来，给他祝福，并嘱咐他说：你不要娶迦南的女子为妻。
chapters.en: And Isaac called Jacob, and blessed him, and charged him, and said unto him, Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan.

chapters.zh: 你起身往巴旦亚兰去，到你外祖彼土利家里，在你母舅拉班的女儿中娶一女为妻。
chapters.en: Arise, go to Padanaram, to the house of Bethuel thy mother's father; and take thee a wife from thence of the daughters of Laban thy mother's brother.

chapters.zh: 愿全能的神赐福给你，使你生养众多，成为多族，
chapters.en: And God Almighty bless thee, and make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, that thou mayest be a multitude of people;

chapters.zh: 将应许亚伯拉罕的福赐给你和你的后裔，使你承受你所寄居的地为业，就是神赐给亚伯拉罕的地。
chapters.en: And give thee the blessing of Abraham, to thee, and to thy seed with thee; that thou mayest inherit the land wherein thou art a stranger, which God gave unto Abraham.

chapters.zh: 以撒打发雅各走了，他就往巴旦亚兰去，到亚兰人彼土利的儿子拉班那里。拉班是雅各、以扫的母舅。
chapters.en: And Isaac sent away Jacob: and he went to Padanaram unto Laban, son of Bethuel the Syrian, the brother of Rebekah, Jacob's and Esau's mother.

chapters.zh: 以扫见以撒已经给雅各祝福，而且打发他往巴旦亚兰去，在那里娶妻，并见祝福的时候嘱咐他说：不要娶迦南的女子为妻，
chapters.en: When Esau saw that Isaac had blessed Jacob, and sent him away to Padanaram, to take him a wife from thence; and that as he blessed him he gave him a charge, saying, Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan;

chapters.zh: 又见雅各听从父母的话往巴旦亚兰去了，
chapters.en: And that Jacob obeyed his father and his mother, and was gone to Padanaram;

chapters.zh: 以扫就晓得他父亲以撒看不中迦南的女子，
chapters.en: And Esau seeing that the daughters of Canaan pleased not Isaac his father;

chapters.zh: 便往以实玛利那里去，在他二妻之外又娶了玛哈拉为妻。他是亚伯拉罕儿子以实玛利的女儿，尼拜约的妹子。
chapters.en: Then went Esau unto Ishmael, and took unto the wives which he had Mahalath the daughter of Ishmael Abraham's son, the sister of Nebajoth, to be his wife.

chapters.zh: 雅各出了别是巴，向哈兰走去；
chapters.en: And Jacob went out from Beersheba, and went toward Haran.

chapters.zh: 到了一个地方，因为太阳落了，就在那里住宿，便拾起那地方的一块石头枕在头下，在那里躺卧睡了，
chapters.en: And he lighted upon a certain place, and tarried there all night, because the sun was set; and he took of the stones of that place, and put his pillows, and lay down in that place to sleep.

chapters.zh: 梦见一个梯子立在地上，梯子的头顶著天，有神的使者在梯子上，上去下来。
chapters.en: And he dreamed, and behold a ladder set up on the earth, and the top of it reached to heaven: and behold the angels of God ascending and descending on it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华站在梯子以上 ( 或作站在他旁边 )，说：我是耶和华 ─ 你祖亚伯拉罕的神，也是以撒的神；我要将你现在所躺卧之地赐给你和你的后裔。
chapters.en: And, behold, the LORD stood above it, and said, I the LORD God of Abraham thy father, and the God of Isaac: the land whereon thou liest, to thee will I give it, and to thy seed;

chapters.zh: 你的后裔必像地上的尘沙那样多，必向东西南北开展；地上万族必因你和你的后裔得福。
chapters.en: And thy seed shall be as the dust of the earth, and thou shalt spread abroad to the west, and to the east, and to the north, and to the south: and in thee and in thy seed shall all the families of the earth be blessed.

chapters.zh: 我也与你同在。你无论往那里去，我必保佑你，领你归回这地，总不离弃你，直到我成全了向你所应许的。
chapters.en: And, behold, I with thee, and will keep thee in all whither thou goest, and will bring thee again into this land; for I will not leave thee, until I have done which I have spoken to thee of.

chapters.zh: 雅各睡醒了，说：耶和华真在这里，我竟不知道！
chapters.en: And Jacob awaked out of his sleep, and he said, Surely the LORD is in this place; and I knew not.

chapters.zh: 就惧怕，说：这地方何等可畏！这不是别的，乃是神的殿，也是天的门。
chapters.en: And he was afraid, and said, How dreadful this place! this none other but the house of God, and this the gate of heaven.

chapters.zh: 雅各清早起来，把所枕的石头立作柱子，浇油在上面。
chapters.en: And Jacob rose up early in the morning, and took the stone that he had put his pillows, and set it up a pillar, and poured oil upon the top of it.

chapters.zh: 他就给那地方起名叫伯特利 ( 就是神殿的意思 )；但那地方起先名叫路斯。
chapters.en: And he called the name of that place Bethel: but the name of that city Luz at the first.

chapters.zh: 雅各许愿说：神若与我同在，在我所行的路上保佑我，又给我食物吃，衣服穿，
chapters.en: And Jacob vowed a vow, saying, If God will be with me, and will keep me in this way that I go, and will give me bread to eat, and raiment to put on,

chapters.zh: 使我平平安安地回到我父亲的家，我就必以耶和华为我的神。
chapters.en: So that I come again to my father's house in peace; then shall the LORD be my God:

chapters.zh: 我所立为柱子的石头也必作神的殿，凡你所赐给我的，我必将十分之一献给你。
chapters.en: And this stone, which I have set a pillar, shall be God's house: and of all that thou shalt give me I will surely give the tenth unto thee.

chapters.zh: 雅各起行，到了东方人之地，
chapters.en: Then Jacob went on his journey, and came into the land of the people of the east.

chapters.zh: 看见田间有一口井，有三群羊卧在井旁；因为人饮羊群都是用那井里的水。井口上的石头是大的。
chapters.en: And he looked, and behold a well in the field, and, lo, there three flocks of sheep lying by it; for out of that well they watered the flocks: and a great stone upon the well's mouth.

chapters.zh: 常有羊群在那里聚集，牧人把石头转离井口饮羊，随后又把石头放在井口的原处。
chapters.en: And thither were all the flocks gathered: and they rolled the stone from the well's mouth, and watered the sheep, and put the stone again upon the well's mouth in his place.

chapters.zh: 雅各对牧人说：弟兄们，你们是那里来的？他们说：我们是哈兰来的。
chapters.en: And Jacob said unto them, My brethren, whence ye? And they said, Of Haran we.

chapters.zh: 他问他们说：拿鹤的孙子拉班，你们认识么？他们说：我们认识。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Know ye Laban the son of Nahor? And they said, We know .

chapters.zh: 雅各说：他平安么？他们说：平安。看哪，他女儿拉结领著羊来了。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, he well? And they said, well: and, behold, Rachel his daughter cometh with the sheep.

chapters.zh: 雅各说：日头还高，不是羊群聚集的时候，你们不如饮羊，再去放一放。
chapters.en: And he said, Lo, yet high day, neither time that the cattle should be gathered together: water ye the sheep, and go feed .

chapters.zh: 他们说：我们不能，必等羊群聚齐，人把石头转离井口才可饮羊。
chapters.en: And they said, We cannot, until all the flocks be gathered together, and they roll the stone from the well's mouth; then we water the sheep.

chapters.zh: 雅各正和他们说话的时候，拉结领著他父亲的羊来了，因为那些羊是他牧放的。
chapters.en: And while he yet spake with them, Rachel came with her father's sheep: for she kept them.

chapters.zh: 雅各看见母舅拉班的女儿拉结和母舅拉班的羊群，就上前把石头转离井口，饮他母舅拉班的羊群。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Jacob saw Rachel the daughter of Laban his mother's brother, and the sheep of Laban his mother's brother, that Jacob went near, and rolled the stone from the well's mouth, and watered the flock of Laban his mother's brother.

chapters.zh: 雅各与拉结亲嘴，就放声而哭。
chapters.en: And Jacob kissed Rachel, and lifted up his voice, and wept.

chapters.zh: 雅各告诉拉结，自己是他父亲的外甥，是利百加的儿子，拉结就跑去告诉他父亲。
chapters.en: And Jacob told Rachel that he her father's brother, and that he Rebekah's son: and she ran and told her father.

chapters.zh: 拉班听见外甥雅各的信息，就跑去迎接，抱著他，与他亲嘴，领他到自己的家。雅各将一切的情由告诉拉班。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Laban heard the tidings of Jacob his sister's son, that he ran to meet him, and embraced him, and kissed him, and brought him to his house. And he told Laban all these things.

chapters.zh: 拉班对他说：你实在是我的骨肉。雅各就和他同住了一个月。
chapters.en: And Laban said to him, Surely thou my bone and my flesh. And he abode with him the space of a month.

chapters.zh: 拉班对雅各说：你虽是我的骨肉 ( 原文作弟兄 )，岂可白白地服事我？请告诉我，你要甚么为工价？
chapters.en: And Laban said unto Jacob, Because thou my brother, shouldest thou therefore serve me for nought? tell me, what thy wages ?

chapters.zh: 拉班有两个女儿，大的名叫利亚，小的名叫拉结。
chapters.en: And Laban had two daughters: the name of the elder Leah, and the name of the younger Rachel.

chapters.zh: 利亚的眼睛没有神气，拉结却生得美貌俊秀。
chapters.en: Leah tender eyed; but Rachel was beautiful and well favoured.

chapters.zh: 雅各爱拉结，就说：我愿为你小女儿拉结服事你七年。
chapters.en: And Jacob loved Rachel; and said, I will serve thee seven years for Rachel thy younger daughter.

chapters.zh: 拉班说：我把他给你，胜似给别人，你与我同住罢！
chapters.en: And Laban said, better that I give her to thee, than that I should give her to another man: abide with me.

chapters.zh: 雅各就为拉结服事了七年；他因为深爱拉结，就看这七年如同几天。
chapters.en: And Jacob served seven years for Rachel; and they seemed unto him a few days, for the love he had to her.

chapters.zh: 雅各对拉班说：日期已经满了，求你把我的妻子给我，我好与他同房。
chapters.en: And Jacob said unto Laban, Give my wife, for my days are fulfilled, that I may go in unto her.

chapters.zh: 拉班就摆设筵席，请齐了那地方的众人。
chapters.en: And Laban gathered together all the men of the place, and made a feast.

chapters.zh: 到晚上，拉班将女儿利亚送来给雅各，雅各就与他同房。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the evening, that he took Leah his daughter, and brought her to him; and he went in unto her.

chapters.zh: 拉班又将婢女悉帕给女儿利亚作使女。
chapters.en: And Laban gave unto his daughter Leah Zilpah his maid an handmaid.

chapters.zh: 到了早晨，雅各一看是利亚，就对拉班说：你向我做的是甚么事呢？我服事你，不是为拉结么？你为甚么欺哄我呢？
chapters.en: And it came to pass, that in the morning, behold, it Leah: and he said to Laban, What this thou hast done unto me? did not I serve with thee for Rachel? wherefore then hast thou beguiled me?

chapters.zh: 拉班说：大女儿还没有给人，先把小女儿给人，在我们这地方没有这规矩。
chapters.en: And Laban said, It must not be so done in our country, to give the younger before the firstborn.

chapters.zh: 你为这个满了七日，我就把那个也给你，你再为他服事我七年。
chapters.en: Fulfil her week, and we will give thee this also for the service which thou shalt serve with me yet seven other years.

chapters.zh: 雅各就如此行。满了利亚的七日，拉班便将女儿拉结给雅各为妻。
chapters.en: And Jacob did so, and fulfilled her week: and he gave him Rachel his daughter to wife also.

chapters.zh: 拉班又将婢女辟拉给女儿拉结作使女。
chapters.en: And Laban gave to Rachel his daughter Bilhah his handmaid to be her maid.

chapters.zh: 雅各也与拉结同房，并且爱拉结胜似爱利亚，于是又服事了拉班七年。
chapters.en: And he went in also unto Rachel, and he loved also Rachel more than Leah, and served with him yet seven other years.

chapters.zh: 耶和华见利亚失宠 ( 原文作被恨；下同 )，就使他生育，拉结却不生育。
chapters.en: And when the LORD saw that Leah hated, he opened her womb: but Rachel barren.

chapters.zh: 利亚怀孕生子，就给他起名叫流便 ( 就是有儿子的意思 )，因而说：耶和华看见我的苦情，如今我的丈夫必爱我。
chapters.en: And Leah conceived, and bare a son, and she called his name Reuben: for she said, Surely the LORD hath looked upon my affliction; now therefore my husband will love me.

chapters.zh: 他又怀孕生子，就说：耶和华因为听见我失宠，所以又赐给我这个儿子，于是给他起名叫西缅 ( 就是听见的意思 )。
chapters.en: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and said, Because the LORD hath heard that I hated, he hath therefore given me this also: and she called his name Simeon.

chapters.zh: 他又怀孕生子，起名叫利未 ( 就是联合的意思 )，说：我给丈夫生了三个儿子，他必与我联合。
chapters.en: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and said, Now this time will my husband be joined unto me, because I have born him three sons: therefore was his name called Levi.

chapters.zh: 他又怀孕生子，说：这回我要赞美耶和华，因此给他起名叫犹大 ( 就是赞美的意思 )。这才停了生育。
chapters.en: And she conceived again, and bare a son: and she said, Now will I praise the LORD: therefore she called his name Judah; and left bearing.

chapters.zh: 拉结见自己不给雅各生子，就嫉妒他姊姊，对雅各说：你给我孩子，不然我就死了。
chapters.en: And when Rachel saw that she bare Jacob no children, Rachel envied her sister; and said unto Jacob, Give me children, or else I die.

chapters.zh: 雅各向拉结生气，说：叫你不生育的是神，我岂能代替他作主呢？
chapters.en: And Jacob's anger was kindled against Rachel: and he said, I in God's stead, who hath withheld from thee the fruit of the womb?

chapters.zh: 拉结说：有我的使女辟拉在这里，你可以与他同房，使他生子在我膝下，我便因他也得孩子 ( 原文作被建立 )。
chapters.en: And she said, Behold my maid Bilhah, go in unto her; and she shall bear upon my knees, that I may also have children by her.

chapters.zh: 拉结就把他的使女辟拉给丈夫为妾；雅各便与他同房，
chapters.en: And she gave him Bilhah her handmaid to wife: and Jacob went in unto her.

chapters.zh: 辟拉就怀孕，给雅各生了一个儿子。
chapters.en: And Bilhah conceived, and bare Jacob a son.

chapters.zh: 拉结说：神伸了我的冤，也听了我的声音，赐我一个儿子，因此给他起名叫但 ( 就是伸冤的意思 )。
chapters.en: And Rachel said, God hath judged me, and hath also heard my voice, and hath given me a son: therefore called she his name Dan.

chapters.zh: 拉结的使女辟拉又怀孕，给雅各生了第二个儿子。
chapters.en: And Bilhah Rachel's maid conceived again, and bare Jacob a second son.

chapters.zh: 拉结说：我与我姊姊大大相争，并且得胜，于是给他起名叫拿弗他利 ( 就是相争的意思 )。
chapters.en: And Rachel said, With great wrestlings have I wrestled with my sister, and I have prevailed: and she called his name Naphtali.

chapters.zh: 利亚见自己停了生育，就把使女悉帕给雅各为妾。
chapters.en: When Leah saw that she had left bearing, she took Zilpah her maid, and gave her Jacob to wife.

chapters.zh: 利亚的使女悉帕给雅各生了一个儿子。
chapters.en: And Zilpah Leah's maid bare Jacob a son.

chapters.zh: 利亚说：万幸！于是给他起名叫迦得 ( 就是万幸的意思 )。
chapters.en: And Leah said, A troop cometh: and she called his name Gad.

chapters.zh: 利亚的使女悉帕又给雅各生了第二个儿子。
chapters.en: And Zilpah Leah's maid bare Jacob a second son.

chapters.zh: 利亚说：我有福阿，众女子都要称我是有福的，于是给他起名叫亚设 ( 就是有福的意思 )。
chapters.en: And Leah said, Happy am I, for the daughters will call me blessed: and she called his name Asher.

chapters.zh: 割麦子的时候，流便往田里去，寻见风茄，拿来给他母亲利亚。拉结对利亚说：请你把你儿子的风茄给我些。
chapters.en: And Reuben went in the days of wheat harvest, and found mandrakes in the field, and brought them unto his mother Leah. Then Rachel said to Leah, Give me, I pray thee, of thy son's mandrakes.

chapters.zh: 利亚说：你夺了我的丈夫还算小事么？你又要夺我儿子的风茄么？拉结说：为你儿子的风茄，今夜他可以与你同寝。
chapters.en: And she said unto her, a small matter that thou hast taken my husband? and wouldest thou take away my son's mandrakes also? And Rachel said, Therefore he shall lie with thee to night for thy son's mandrakes.

chapters.zh: 到了晚上，雅各从田里回来，利亚出来迎接他，说：你要与我同寝，因为我实在用我儿子的风茄把你雇下了。那一夜，雅各就与他同寝。
chapters.en: And Jacob came out of the field in the evening, and Leah went out to meet him, and said, Thou must come in unto me; for surely I have hired thee with my son's mandrakes. And he lay with her that night.

chapters.zh: 神应允了利亚，他就怀孕，给雅各生了第五个儿子。
chapters.en: And God hearkened unto Leah, and she conceived, and bare Jacob the fifth son.

chapters.zh: 利亚说：神给了我价值，因为我把使女给了我丈夫，于是给他起名叫以萨迦 ( 就是价值的意思 )。
chapters.en: And Leah said, God hath given me my hire, because I have given my maiden to my husband: and she called his name Issachar.

chapters.zh: 利亚又怀孕，给雅各生了第六个儿子。
chapters.en: And Leah conceived again, and bare Jacob the sixth son.

chapters.zh: 利亚说：神赐我厚赏；我丈夫必与我同住，因我给他生了六个儿子，于是给他起名西布伦 ( 就是同住的意思 )。
chapters.en: And Leah said, God hath endued me a good dowry; now will my husband dwell with me, because I have born him six sons: and she called his name Zebulun.

chapters.zh: 后来又生了一个女儿，给他起名叫底拿。
chapters.en: And afterwards she bare a daughter, and called her name Dinah.

chapters.zh: 神顾念拉结，应允了他，使他能生育。
chapters.en: And God remembered Rachel, and God hearkened to her, and opened her womb.

chapters.zh: 拉结怀孕生子，说：神除去了我的羞耻，
chapters.en: And she conceived, and bare a son; and said, God hath taken away my reproach:

chapters.zh: 就给他起名叫约瑟 ( 就是增添的意思 )，意思说：愿耶和华再增添我一个儿子。
chapters.en: And she called his name Joseph; and said, The LORD shall add to me another son.

chapters.zh: 拉结生约瑟之后，雅各对拉班说：请打发我走，叫我回到我本乡本土去。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Rachel had born Joseph, that Jacob said unto Laban, Send me away, that I may go unto mine own place, and to my country.

chapters.zh: 请你把我服事你所得的妻子和儿女给我，让我走；我怎样服事你，你都知道。
chapters.en: Give my wives and my children, for whom I have served thee, and let me go: for thou knowest my service which I have done thee.

chapters.zh: 拉班对他说：我若在你眼前蒙恩，请你仍与我同住，因为我已算定，耶和华赐福与我是为你的缘故；
chapters.en: And Laban said unto him, I pray thee, if I have found favour in thine eyes, I have learned by experience that the LORD hath blessed me for thy sake.

chapters.zh: 又说：请你定你的工价，我就给你。
chapters.en: And he said, Appoint me thy wages, and I will give .

chapters.zh: 雅各对他说：我怎样服事你，你的牲畜在我手里怎样，是你知道的。
chapters.en: And he said unto him, Thou knowest how I have served thee, and how thy cattle was with me.

chapters.zh: 我未来之先，你所有的很少，现今却发大众多，耶和华随我的脚步赐福与你。如今，我甚么时候才为自己兴家立业呢？
chapters.en: For little which thou hadst before I , and it is increased unto a multitude; and the LORD hath blessed thee since my coming: and now when shall I provide for mine own house also?

chapters.zh: 拉班说：我当给你甚么呢？雅各说：甚么你也不必给我，只有一件事，你若应承，我便仍旧牧放你的羊群。
chapters.en: And he said, What shall I give thee? And Jacob said, Thou shalt not give me any thing: if thou wilt do this thing for me, I will again feed keep thy flock:

chapters.zh: 今天我要走遍你的羊群，把绵羊中凡有点的、有斑的，和黑色的，并山羊中凡有斑的、有点的，都挑出来；将来这一等的就算我的工价。
chapters.en: I will pass through all thy flock to day, removing from thence all the speckled and spotted cattle, and all the brown cattle among the sheep, and the spotted and speckled among the goats: and shall be my hire.

chapters.zh: 以后你来查看我的工价，凡在我手里的山羊不是有点有斑的，绵羊不是黑色的，那就算是我偷的；这样便可证出我的公义来。
chapters.en: So shall my righteousness answer for me in time to come, when it shall come for my hire before thy face: every one that not speckled and spotted among the goats, and brown among the sheep, that shall be counted stolen with me.

chapters.zh: 拉班说：好阿！我情愿照著你的话行。
chapters.en: And Laban said, Behold, I would it might be according to thy word.

chapters.zh: 当日，拉班把有纹的、有斑的公山羊，有点的、有斑的、有杂白纹的母山羊，并黑色的绵羊，都挑出来，交在他儿子们的手下，
chapters.en: And he removed that day the he goats that were ringstraked and spotted, and all the she goats that were speckled and spotted, every one that had white in it, and all the brown among the sheep, and gave into the hand of his sons.

chapters.zh: 又使自己和雅各相离三天的路程。雅各就牧养拉班其余的羊。
chapters.en: And he set three days' journey betwixt himself and Jacob: and Jacob fed the rest of Laban's flocks.

chapters.zh: 雅各拿杨树、杏树、枫树的嫩枝，将皮剥成白纹，使枝子露出白的来，
chapters.en: And Jacob took him rods of green poplar, and of the hazel and chesnut tree; and pilled white strakes in them, and made the white appear which in the rods.

chapters.zh: 将剥了皮的枝子，对著羊群，插在饮羊的水沟里和水槽里，羊来喝的时候，牝牡配合。
chapters.en: And he set the rods which he had pilled before the flocks in the gutters in the watering troughs when the flocks came to drink, that they should conceive when they came to drink.

chapters.zh: 羊对著枝子配合，就生下有纹的、有点的、有斑的来。
chapters.en: And the flocks conceived before the rods, and brought forth cattle ringstraked, speckled, and spotted.

chapters.zh: 雅各把羊羔分出来，使拉班的羊与这有纹和黑色的羊相对，把自己的羊另放一处，不叫他和拉班的羊混杂。
