chapters.en: And Judah said unto Israel his father, Send the lad with me, and we will arise and go; that we may live, and not die, both we, and thou, also our little ones.

chapters.zh: 我为他作保；你可以从我手中追讨，我若不带他回来交在你面前，我情愿永远担罪。
chapters.en: I will be surety for him; of my hand shalt thou require him: if I bring him not unto thee, and set him before thee, then let me bear the blame for ever:

chapters.zh: 我们若没有耽搁，如今第二次都回来了。』
chapters.en: For except we had lingered, surely now we had returned this second time.

chapters.zh: 他们的父亲以色列说：『若必须如此，你们就当这样行：可以将这地土产中最好的乳香、蜂蜜、香料、没药、榧子、杏仁都取一点，收在器具里，带下去送给那人作礼物，
chapters.en: And their father Israel said unto them, If so now, do this; take of the best fruits in the land in your vessels, and carry down the man a present, a little balm, and a little honey, spices, and myrrh, nuts, and almonds:

chapters.zh: 又要手里加倍地带银子，并将归还在你们口袋内的银子仍带在手里；那或者是错了。
chapters.en: And take double money in your hand; and the money that was brought again in the mouth of your sacks, carry again in your hand; peradventure it an oversight:

chapters.zh: 也带著你们的兄弟，起身去见那人。
chapters.en: Take also your brother, and arise, go again unto the man:

chapters.zh: 但愿全能的神使你们在那人面前蒙怜悯，释放你们的那弟兄和便雅悯回来。我若丧了儿子，就丧了吧 !』
chapters.en: And God Almighty give you mercy before the man, that he may send away your other brother, and Benjamin. If I be bereaved , I am bereaved.

chapters.zh: 于是，他们拿著那礼物，又手里加倍地带银子，并且带著便雅悯，起身下到埃及，站在约瑟面前。
chapters.en: And the men took that present, and they took double money in their hand, and Benjamin; and rose up, and went down to Egypt, and stood before Joseph.

chapters.zh: 约瑟见便雅悯和他们同来，就对家宰说：『将这些人领到屋里。要宰杀牲畜，预备筵席，因为晌午这些人同我吃饭。』
chapters.en: And when Joseph saw Benjamin with them, he said to the ruler of his house, Bring men home, and slay, and make ready; for men shall dine with me at noon.

chapters.zh: 家宰就遵著约瑟的命去行，领他们进约瑟的屋里。
chapters.en: And the man did as Joseph bade; and the man brought the men into Joseph's house.

chapters.zh: 他们因为被领到约瑟的屋里，就害怕，说：『领我们到这里来，必是因为头次归还在我们口袋里的银子，找我们的错缝，下手害我们，强取我们为奴仆，抢夺我们的驴。』
chapters.en: And the men were afraid, because they were brought into Joseph's house; and they said, Because of the money that was returned in our sacks at the first time are we brought in; that he may seek occasion against us, and fall upon us, and take us for bondmen, and our asses.

chapters.zh: 他们就挨近约瑟的家宰，在屋门口和他说话，
chapters.en: And they came near to the steward of Joseph's house, and they communed with him at the door of the house,

chapters.zh: 说：『我主啊，我们头次下来实在是要籴粮。
chapters.en: And said, O sir, we came indeed down at the first time to buy food:

chapters.zh: 后来到了住宿的地方，我们打开口袋，不料，各人的银子，分量足数，仍在各人的口袋内，现在我们手里又带回来了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when we came to the inn, that we opened our sacks, and, behold, man's money in the mouth of his sack, our money in full weight: and we have brought it again in our hand.

chapters.zh: 另外又带下银子来籴粮。不知道先前谁把银子放在我们的口袋里。』
chapters.en: And other money have we brought down in our hands to buy food: we cannot tell who put our money in our sacks.

chapters.zh: 家宰说：『你们可以放心，不要害怕，是你们的神和你们父亲的神赐给你们财宝在你们的口袋里；你们的银子，我早已收了。』他就把西缅带出来，交给他们。
chapters.en: And he said, Peace to you, fear not: your God, and the God of your father, hath given you treasure in your sacks: I had your money. And he brought Simeon out unto them.

chapters.zh: 家宰就领他们进约瑟的屋里，给他们水洗脚，又给他们草料喂驴。
chapters.en: And the man brought the men into Joseph's house, and gave water, and they washed their feet; and he gave their asses provender.

chapters.zh: 他们就预备那礼物，等候约瑟晌午来，因为他们听见要在那里吃饭。
chapters.en: And they made ready the present against Joseph came at noon: for they heard that they should eat bread there.

chapters.zh: 约瑟来到家里，他们就把手中的礼物拿进屋去给他，又俯伏在地，向他下拜。
chapters.en: And when Joseph came home, they brought him the present which in their hand into the house, and bowed themselves to him to the earth.

chapters.zh: 约瑟问他们好，又问：『你们的父亲 ─ 就是你们所说的那老人家平安吗？他还在吗？』
chapters.en: And he asked them of welfare, and said, your father well, the old man of whom ye spake? he yet alive?

chapters.zh: 他们回答说：『你仆人 ─ 我们的父亲平安；他还在。』于是他们低头下拜。
chapters.en: And they answered, Thy servant our father in good health, he yet alive. And they bowed down their heads, and made obeisance.

chapters.zh: 约瑟举目看见他同母的兄弟便雅悯，就说：『你们向我所说那顶小的兄弟就是这位吗？』又说：『小儿啊，愿神赐恩给你 !』
chapters.en: And he lifted up his eyes, and saw his brother Benjamin, his mother's son, and said, this your younger brother, of whom ye spake unto me? And he said, God be gracious unto thee, my son.

chapters.zh: 约瑟爱弟之情发动，就急忙寻找可哭之地，进入自己的屋里，哭了一场。
chapters.en: And Joseph made haste; for his bowels did yearn upon his brother: and he sought to weep; and he entered into chamber, and wept there.

chapters.zh: 他洗了脸出来，勉强隐忍，吩咐人摆饭。
chapters.en: And he washed his face, and went out, and refrained himself, and said, Set on bread.

chapters.zh: 他们就为约瑟单摆了一席，为那些人又摆了一席，也为和约瑟同吃饭的埃及人另摆了一席，因为埃及人不可和希伯来人一同吃饭；那原是埃及人所厌恶的。
chapters.en: And they set on for him by himself, and for them by themselves, and for the Egyptians, which did eat with him, by themselves: because the Egyptians might not eat bread with the Hebrews; for that an abomination unto the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 约瑟使众弟兄在他面前排列坐席，都按著长幼的次序，众弟兄就彼此诧异。
chapters.en: And they sat before him, the firstborn according to his birthright, and the youngest according to his youth: and the men marvelled one at another.

chapters.zh: 约瑟把他面前的食物分出来，送给他们；但便雅悯所得的比别人多五倍。他们就饮酒，和约瑟一同宴乐。
chapters.en: And he took messes unto them from before him: but Benjamin's mess was five times so much as any of theirs. And they drank, and were merry with him.

chapters.zh: 约瑟吩咐家宰说：『把粮食装满这些人的口袋，尽著他们的驴所能驮的，又把各人的银子放在各人的口袋里，
chapters.en: And he commanded the steward of his house, saying, Fill the men's sacks food, as much as they can carry, and put every man's money in his sack's mouth.

chapters.zh: 并将我的银杯和那少年人籴粮的银子一同装在他的口袋里。』家宰就照约瑟所说的话行了；
chapters.en: And put my cup, the silver cup, in the sack's mouth of the youngest, and his corn money. And he did according to the word that Joseph had spoken.

chapters.zh: 天一亮就打发那些人带著驴走了。
chapters.en: As soon as the morning was light, the men were sent away, they and their asses.

chapters.zh: 他们出城走了不远，约瑟对家宰说：『起来，追那些人去，追上了就对他们说：「你们为甚么以恶报善呢？
chapters.en: when they were gone out of the city, not far off, Joseph said unto his steward, Up, follow after the men; and when thou dost overtake them, say unto them, Wherefore have ye rewarded evil for good?

chapters.zh: 这不是我主人饮酒的杯吗？岂不是他占卜用的吗？你们这样行是作恶了。」』
chapters.en: not this in which my lord drinketh, and whereby indeed he divineth? ye have done evil in so doing.

chapters.zh: 家宰追上他们，将这些话对他们说了。
chapters.en: And he overtook them, and he spake unto them these same words.

chapters.zh: 他们回答说：『我主为甚么说这样的话呢？你仆人断不能作这样的事。
chapters.en: And they said unto him, Wherefore saith my lord these words? God forbid that thy servants should do according to this thing:

chapters.zh: 你看，我们从前在口袋里所见的银子，尚且从迦南地带来还你，我们怎能从你主人家里偷窃金银呢？
chapters.en: Behold, the money, which we found in our sacks' mouths, we brought again unto thee out of the land of Canaan: how then should we steal out of thy lord's house silver or gold?

chapters.zh: 你仆人中无论在谁那里搜出来，就叫他死，我们也作我主的奴仆。』
chapters.en: With whomsoever of thy servants it be found, both let him die, and we also will be my lord's bondmen.

chapters.zh: 家宰说：『现在就照你们的话行吧 ! 在谁那里搜出来，谁就作我的奴仆；其余的都没有罪。』
chapters.en: And he said, Now also it according unto your words: he with whom it is found shall be my servant; and ye shall be blameless.

chapters.zh: 于是他们各人急忙把口袋卸在地下，各人打开口袋。
chapters.en: Then they speedily took down every man his sack to the ground, and opened every man his sack.

chapters.zh: 家宰就搜查，从年长的起到年幼的为止，那杯竟在便雅悯的口袋里搜出来。
chapters.en: And he searched, began at the eldest, and left at the youngest: and the cup was found in Benjamin's sack.

chapters.zh: 他们就撕裂衣服，各人把驮子抬在驴上，回城去了。
chapters.en: Then they rent their clothes, and laded every man his ass, and returned to the city.

chapters.zh: 犹大和他弟兄们来到约瑟的屋中，约瑟还在那里，他们就在他面前俯伏于地。
chapters.en: And Judah and his brethren came to Joseph's house; for he yet there: and they fell before him on the ground.

chapters.zh: 约瑟对他们说：『你们作的是甚么事呢？你们岂不知像我这样的人必能占卜吗？』
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto them, What deed this that ye have done? wot ye not that such a man as I can certainly divine?

chapters.zh: 犹大说：『我们对我主说甚么呢？还有甚么话可说呢？我们怎能自己表白出来呢？神已经查出仆人的罪孽了。我们与那在他手中搜出杯来的都是我主的奴仆。
chapters.en: And Judah said, What shall we say unto my lord? what shall we speak? or how shall we clear ourselves? God hath found out the iniquity of thy servants: behold, we my lord's servants, both we, and also with whom the cup is found.

chapters.zh: 约瑟说：『我断不能这样行 ! 在谁的手中搜出杯来，谁就作我的奴仆；至于你们，可以平平安安地上你们父亲那里去。』
chapters.en: And he said, God forbid that I should do so: the man in whose hand the cup is found, he shall be my servant; and as for you, get you up in peace unto your father.

chapters.zh: 犹大挨近他，说：『我主啊，求你容仆人说一句话给我主听，不要向仆人发烈怒，因为你如同法老一样。
chapters.en: Then Judah came near unto him, and said, Oh my lord, let thy servant, I pray thee, speak a word in my lord's ears, and let not thine anger burn against thy servant: for thou even as Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 我主曾问仆人们说：「你们有父亲有兄弟没有？」
chapters.en: My lord asked his servants, saying, Have ye a father, or a brother?

chapters.zh: 我们对我主说：「我们有父亲，已经年老，还有他老年所生的一个小孩子。他哥哥死了，他母亲只撇下他一人，他父亲疼爱他。」
chapters.en: And we said unto my lord, We have a father, an old man, and a child of his old age, a little one; and his brother is dead, and he alone is left of his mother, and his father loveth him.

chapters.zh: 你对仆人说：「把他带到我这里来，叫我亲眼看看他。」
chapters.en: And thou saidst unto thy servants, Bring him down unto me, that I may set mine eyes upon him.

chapters.zh: 我们对我主说：童子不能离开他父亲，若是离开，他父亲必死。
chapters.en: And we said unto my lord, The lad cannot leave his father: for he should leave his father, would die.

chapters.zh: 你对仆人说：你们的小兄弟若不与你们一同下来，你们就不得再见我的面。
chapters.en: And thou saidst unto thy servants, Except your youngest brother come down with you, ye shall see my face no more.

chapters.zh: 我们上到你仆人 ─ 我们父亲那里，就把我主的话告诉了他。
chapters.en: And it came to pass when we came up unto thy servant my father, we told him the words of my lord.

chapters.zh: 我们的父亲说：你们再去给我籴些粮来。
chapters.en: And our father said, Go again, buy us a little food.

chapters.zh: 我们就说：我们不能下去。我们的小兄弟若和我们同往，我们就可以下去。因为，小兄弟若不与我们同往，我们必不得见那人的面。
chapters.en: And we said, We cannot go down: if our youngest brother be with us, then will we go down: for we may not see the man's face, except our youngest brother with us.

chapters.zh: 你仆人 ─ 我父亲对我们说：你们知道我的妻子给我生了两个儿子。
chapters.en: And thy servant my father said unto us, Ye know that my wife bare me two :

chapters.zh: 一个离开我出去了；我说他必是被撕碎了，直到如今我也没有见他。
chapters.en: And the one went out from me, and I said, Surely he is torn in pieces; and I saw him not since:

chapters.zh: 现在你们又要把这个带去离开我，倘若他遭害，那便是你们使我白发苍苍、悲悲惨惨地下阴间去了。
chapters.en: And if ye take this also from me, and mischief befall him, ye shall bring down my gray hairs with sorrow to the grave.

chapters.zh: 我父亲的命与这童子的命相连。如今我回到你仆人 ─ 我父亲那里，若没有童子与我们同在，
chapters.en: Now therefore when I come to thy servant my father, and the lad not with us; seeing that his life is bound up in the lad's life;

chapters.zh: 我们的父亲见没有童子，他就必死。这便是我们使你仆人 ─ 我们的父亲白发苍苍、悲悲惨惨地下阴间去了。
chapters.en: It shall come to pass, when he seeth that the lad not , that he will die: and thy servants shall bring down the gray hairs of thy servant our father with sorrow to the grave.

chapters.zh: 因为仆人曾向我父亲为这童子作保，说：我若不带他回来交给父亲，我便在父亲面前永远担罪。
chapters.en: For thy servant became surety for the lad unto my father, saying, If I bring him not unto thee, then I shall bear the blame to my father for ever.

chapters.zh: 现在求你容仆人住下，替这童子作我主的奴仆，叫童子和他哥哥们一同上去。
chapters.en: Now therefore, I pray thee, let thy servant abide instead of the lad a bondman to my lord; and let the lad go up with his brethren.

chapters.zh: 若童子不和我同去，我怎能上去见我父亲呢？恐怕我看见灾祸临到我父亲身上。
chapters.en: For how shall I go up to my father, and the lad not with me? lest peradventure I see the evil that shall come on my father.

chapters.zh: 约瑟在左右站著的人面前情不自禁，吩咐一声说：人都要离开我出去！约瑟和弟兄相认的时候并没有一人站在他面前。
chapters.en: Then Joseph could not refrain himself before all them that stood by him; and he cried, Cause every man to go out from me. And there stood no man with him, while Joseph made himself known unto his brethren.

chapters.zh: 他就放声大哭，埃及人和法老家中的人都听见了。
chapters.en: And he wept aloud: and the Egyptians and the house of Pharaoh heard.

chapters.zh: 约瑟对他弟兄们说：我是约瑟。我的父亲还在么？他弟兄不能回答，因为在他面前都惊惶。
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto his brethren, I Joseph; doth my father yet live? And his brethren could not answer him; for they were troubled at his presence.

chapters.zh: 约瑟又对他弟兄们说：请你们近前来。他们就近前来。他说：我是你们的兄弟约瑟，就是你们所卖到埃及的。
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto his brethren, Come near to me, I pray you. And they came near. And he said, I Joseph your brother, whom ye sold into Egypt.

chapters.zh: 现在，不要因为把我卖到这里自忧自恨。这是神差我在你们以先来，为要保全生命。
chapters.en: Now therefore be not grieved, nor angry with yourselves, that ye sold me hither: for God did send me before you to preserve life.

chapters.zh: 现在这地的饥荒已经二年了，还有五年不能耕种，不能收成。
chapters.en: For these two years the famine in the land: and yet five years, in the which neither earing nor harvest.

chapters.zh: 神差我在你们以先来，为要给你们存留余种在世上，又要大施拯救，保全你们的生命。
chapters.en: And God sent me before you to preserve you a posterity in the earth, and to save your lives by a great deliverance.

chapters.zh: 这样看来，差我到这里来的不是你们，乃是神。他又使我如法老的父，作他全家的主，并埃及全地的宰相。
chapters.en: So now not you sent me hither, but God: and he hath made me a father to Pharaoh, and lord of all his house, and a ruler throughout all the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 你们要赶紧上到我父亲那里。对他说：你儿子约瑟这样说：神使我作全埃及的主，请你下到我这里来，不要耽延。
chapters.en: Haste ye, and go up to my father, and say unto him, Thus saith thy son Joseph, God hath made me lord of all Egypt: come down unto me, tarry not:

chapters.zh: 你和你我儿子孙子，连牛群羊群，并一切所有的，都可以住在歌珊地，与我相近。
chapters.en: And thou shalt dwell in the land of Goshen, and thou shalt be near unto me, thou, and thy children, and thy children's children, and thy flocks, and thy herds, and all that thou hast:

chapters.zh: 我要在那里奉养你；因为还有五年的饥荒，免得你和你的眷属，并一切所有的，都败落了。
chapters.en: And there will I nourish thee; for yet five years of famine; lest thou, and thy household, and all that thou hast, come to poverty.

chapters.zh: 况且你们的眼和我兄弟便雅悯的眼都看见是我亲口对你们说话。
chapters.en: And, behold, your eyes see, and the eyes of my brother Benjamin, that my mouth that speaketh unto you.

chapters.zh: 你们也要将我在埃及一切的荣耀和你们所看见的事都告诉我父亲，又要赶紧的将我父亲搬到我这里来。
chapters.en: And ye shall tell my father of all my glory in Egypt, and of all that ye have seen; and ye shall haste and bring down my father hither.

chapters.zh: 于是约瑟伏在他兄弟便雅悯的颈项上哭，便雅悯也在他的颈项上哭。
chapters.en: And he fell upon his brother Benjamin's neck, and wept; and Benjamin wept upon his neck.

chapters.zh: 他又与众弟兄亲嘴，抱著他们哭，随后他弟兄就和他说话。
chapters.en: Moreover he kissed all his brethren, and wept upon them: and after that his brethren talked with him.

chapters.zh: 这风声传到法老的宫里，说：约瑟的弟兄们来了。法老和他的臣仆都很喜欢。
chapters.en: And the fame thereof was heard in Pharaoh's house, saying, Joseph's brethren are come: and it pleased Pharaoh well, and his servants.

chapters.zh: 法老对约瑟说：你吩咐你的弟兄们说：你们要这样行：把驮子抬在牲口上，起身往迦南地去。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph, Say unto thy brethren, This do ye; lade your beasts, and go, get you unto the land of Canaan;

chapters.zh: 将你们的父亲和你们的眷属都搬到我这里来，我要把埃及地的美物赐给你们，你们也要吃这地肥美的出产。
chapters.en: And take your father and your households, and come unto me: and I will give you the good of the land of Egypt, and ye shall eat the fat of the land.

chapters.zh: 现在我吩咐你们要这样行：从埃及地带著车辆去，把你们的孩子和妻子，并你们的父亲都搬来。
chapters.en: Now thou art commanded, this do ye; take you wagons out of the land of Egypt for your little ones, and for your wives, and bring your father, and come.

chapters.zh: 你们眼中不要爱惜你们的家具，因为埃及全地的美物都是你们的。
chapters.en: Also regard not your stuff; for the good of all the land of Egypt yours.

chapters.zh: 以色列的儿子们就如此行。约瑟照著法老的吩咐给他们车辆和路上用的食物，
chapters.en: And the children of Israel did so: and Joseph gave them wagons, according to the commandment of Pharaoh, and gave them provision for the way.

chapters.zh: 又给他们各人一套衣服，惟独给便雅悯三百银子，五套衣服；
chapters.en: To all of them he gave each man changes of raiment; but to Benjamin he gave three hundred of silver, and five changes of raiment.

chapters.zh: 送给他父亲公驴十匹，驮著埃及的美物，母驴十匹，驮著粮食与饼和菜，为他父亲路上用。
chapters.en: And to his father he sent after this ; ten asses laden with the good things of Egypt, and ten she asses laden with corn and bread and meat for his father by the way.

chapters.zh: 于是约瑟打发他弟兄们回去，又对他们说：你们不要在路上相争。
chapters.en: So he sent his brethren away, and they departed: and he said unto them, See that ye fall not out by the way.

chapters.zh: 他们从埃及上去，来到迦南地、他们的父亲雅各那里，
chapters.en: And they went up out of Egypt, and came into the land of Canaan unto Jacob their father,

chapters.zh: 告诉他说：约瑟还在，并且作埃及全地的宰相。雅各心里冰凉，因为不信他们。
chapters.en: And told him, saying, Joseph yet alive, and he governor over all the land of Egypt. And Jacob's heart fainted, for he believed them not.

chapters.zh: 他们便将约瑟对他们说的一切话都告诉了他。他们父亲雅各又看见约瑟打发来接他的车辆，心就苏醒了。
chapters.en: And they told him all the words of Joseph, which he had said unto them: and when he saw the wagons which Joseph had sent to carry him, the spirit of Jacob their father revived:

chapters.zh: 以色列说：罢了！罢了！我的儿子约瑟还在，趁我未死以先，我要去见他一面。
chapters.en: And Israel said, enough; Joseph my son yet alive: I will go and see him before I die.

chapters.zh: 以色列带著一切所有的，起身来到别是巴，就献祭给他父亲以撒的神。
chapters.en: And Israel took his journey with all that he had, and came to Beersheba, and offered sacrifices unto the God of his father Isaac.

chapters.zh: 夜间，神在异象中对以色列说：雅各！雅各！他说：我在这里。
chapters.en: And God spake unto Israel in the visions of the night, and said, Jacob, Jacob. And he said, Here I.

chapters.zh: 神说：我是神，就是你父亲的神。你下埃及去不要害怕，因为我必使你在那里成为大族。
chapters.en: And he said, I God, the God of thy father: fear not to go down into Egypt; for I will there make of thee a great nation:

chapters.zh: 我要和你同下埃及去，也必定带你上来；约瑟必给你送终 ( 原文作将手按在你的眼睛上 )。
chapters.en: I will go down with thee into Egypt; and I will also surely bring thee up : and Joseph shall put his hand upon thine eyes.

chapters.zh: 雅各就从别是巴起行。以色列的儿子们使他们的父亲雅各和他们的妻子、儿女都坐在法老为雅各送来的车上。
chapters.en: And Jacob rose up from Beersheba: and the sons of Israel carried Jacob their father, and their little ones, and their wives, in the wagons which Pharaoh had sent to carry him.

chapters.zh: 他们又带著迦南地所得的牲畜、货财来到埃及。雅各和他的一切子孙都一同来了，
chapters.en: And they took their cattle, and their goods, which they had gotten in the land of Canaan, and came into Egypt, Jacob, and all his seed with him:

chapters.zh: 雅各把他的儿子、孙子、女儿、孙女，并他的子子孙孙，一同带到埃及。
chapters.en: His sons, and his sons' sons with him, his daughters, and his sons' daughters, and all his seed brought he with him into Egypt.

chapters.zh: 来到埃及的以色列人名字记在下面。雅各和他的儿孙：雅各的长子是流便。
chapters.en: And these the names of the children of Israel, which came into Egypt, Jacob and his sons: Reuben, Jacob's firstborn.

chapters.zh: 流便的儿子是哈诺、法路、希斯伦、迦米。
chapters.en: And the sons of Reuben; Hanoch, and Phallu, and Hezron, and Carmi.

chapters.zh: 西缅的儿子是耶母利、雅悯、阿辖、雅斤、琐辖，还有迦南女子所生的扫罗。
chapters.en: And the sons of Simeon; Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanitish woman.

chapters.zh: 利未的儿子是革顺、哥辖、米拉利。
chapters.en: And the sons of Levi; Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

chapters.zh: 犹大的儿子是珥、俄南、示拉、法勒斯、谢拉；惟有珥与俄南死在迦南地。法勒斯的儿子是希斯伦、哈母勒。
chapters.en: And the sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah, and Pharez, and Zerah: but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. And the sons of Pharez were Hezron and Hamul.

chapters.zh: 以萨迦的儿子是陀拉、普瓦、约伯、伸仑。
chapters.en: And the sons of Issachar; Tola, and Phuvah, and Job, and Shimron.

chapters.zh: 西布伦的儿子是西烈、以伦、雅利。
chapters.en: And the sons of Zebulun; Sered, and Elon, and Jahleel.

chapters.zh: 这是利亚在巴旦亚兰给雅各所生的儿子，还在女儿底拿。儿孙共三十三人。
chapters.en: These the sons of Leah, which she bare unto Jacob in Padanaram, with his daughter Dinah: all the souls of his sons and his daughters thirty and three.

chapters.zh: 迦得的儿子是洗非芸、哈基、书尼、以斯本、以利、亚罗底、亚列利。
chapters.en: And the sons of Gad; Ziphion, and Haggi, Shuni, and Ezbon, Eri, and Arodi, and Areli.

chapters.zh: 亚设的儿子是音拿、亦施瓦、亦施韦、比利亚，还有他们的妹子西拉。比利亚的儿子是希别、玛结。
chapters.en: And the sons of Asher; Jimnah, and Ishuah, and Isui, and Beriah, and Serah their sister: and the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel.

chapters.zh: 这是拉班给他女儿利亚的婢女悉帕从雅各所生的儿孙，共有十六人。
chapters.en: These the sons of Zilpah, whom Laban gave to Leah his daughter, and these she bare unto Jacob, sixteen souls.

chapters.zh: 雅各之妻拉结的儿子是约瑟和便雅悯。
chapters.en: The sons of Rachel Jacob's wife; Joseph, and Benjamin.

chapters.zh: 约瑟在埃及地生了玛拿西和以法莲，就是安城的祭司波提非拉的女儿亚西纳给约瑟生的。
chapters.en: And unto Joseph in the land of Egypt were born Manasseh and Ephraim, which Asenath the daughter of Potipherah priest of On bare unto him.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯的儿子是比拉、比结、亚实别、基拉、乃幔、以希、罗实、母平、户平、亚勒。
chapters.en: And the sons of Benjamin Belah, and Becher, and Ashbel, Gera, and Naaman, Ehi, and Rosh, Muppim, and Huppim, and Ard.

chapters.zh: 这是拉结给雅各所生的儿孙，共有十四人。
chapters.en: These the sons of Rachel, which were born to Jacob: all the souls fourteen.

chapters.zh: 但的儿子是户伸。
chapters.en: And the sons of Dan; Hushim.

chapters.zh: 拿弗他利的儿子是雅薛、沽尼、耶色、示冷。
chapters.en: And the sons of Naphtali; Jahzeel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shillem.

chapters.zh: 这是拉班给他女儿拉结的婢女辟拉从雅各所生的儿孙，共有七人。
chapters.en: These the sons of Bilhah, which Laban gave unto Rachel his daughter, and she bare these unto Jacob: all the souls seven.

chapters.zh: 那与雅各同到埃及的，除了他儿妇之外，凡从他所生的，共有六十六人。
chapters.en: All the souls that came with Jacob into Egypt, which came out of his loins, besides Jacob's sons' wives, all the souls threescore and six;

chapters.zh: 还有约瑟在埃及所生的两个儿子。雅各家来到埃及的共有七十人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Joseph, which were born him in Egypt, two souls: all the souls of the house of Jacob, which came into Egypt, threescore and ten.

chapters.zh: 雅各打发犹大先去见约瑟，请派人引路往歌珊去；于是他们来到歌珊地。
chapters.en: And he sent Judah before him unto Joseph, to direct his face unto Goshen; and they came into the land of Goshen.

chapters.zh: 约瑟套车往歌珊去，迎接他父亲以色列，及至见了面，就伏在父亲的颈项，哭了许久。
chapters.en: And Joseph made ready his chariot, and went up to meet Israel his father, to Goshen, and presented himself unto him; and he fell on his neck, and wept on his neck a good while.

chapters.zh: 以色列对约瑟说：我既得见你的面，知道你还在，就是死我也甘心。
chapters.en: And Israel said unto Joseph, Now let me die, since I have seen thy face, because thou yet alive.

chapters.zh: 约瑟对他的弟兄和他父的全家说：我要上去告诉法老，对他说：我的弟兄和我父的全家从前在迦南地，现今都到我这里来了。
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto his brethren, and unto his father's house, I will go up, and shew Pharaoh, and say unto him, My brethren, and my father's house, which in the land of Canaan, are come unto me;

chapters.zh: 他们本是牧羊的人，以养牲畜为业；他们把羊群牛群和一切所有的都带来了。
chapters.en: And the men shepherds, for their trade hath been to feed cattle; and they have brought their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have.

chapters.zh: 等法老召你们的时候，问你们说：你们以何事为业？
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when Pharaoh shall call you, and shall say, What your occupation?

chapters.zh: 你们要说：你的仆人，从幼年直到如今，都以养牲畜为业，连我们的祖宗也都以此为业。这样，你们可以住在歌珊地，因为凡牧羊的都被埃及人所厌恶。
chapters.en: That ye shall say, Thy servants' trade hath been about cattle from our youth even until now, both we, also our fathers: that ye may dwell in the land of Goshen; for every shepherd an abomination unto the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 约瑟进去告诉法老说：我的父亲和我的弟兄带著羊群牛群，并一切所有的，从迦南地来了，如今在歌珊地。
chapters.en: Then Joseph came and told Pharaoh, and said, My father and my brethren, and their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have, are come out of the land of Canaan; and, behold, they in the land of Goshen.

chapters.zh: 约瑟从他弟兄中挑出五个人来，引他们去见法老。
chapters.en: And he took some of his brethren, five men, and presented them unto Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 法老问约瑟的弟兄说：你们以可事为业？他们对法老说：你仆人是牧羊的，连我们的祖宗也是牧羊的。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said unto his brethren, What your occupation? And they said unto Pharaoh, Thy servants shepherds, both we, also our fathers.

chapters.zh: 他们又对法老说：迦南地的饥荒甚大，仆人的羊群没有草吃，所以我们来到这地寄居。现在求你容仆人住在歌珊地。
chapters.en: They said moreover unto Pharaoh, For to sojourn in the land are we come; for thy servants have no pasture for their flocks; for the famine sore in the land of Canaan: now therefore, we pray thee, let thy servants dwell in the land of Goshen.

chapters.zh: 法老对约瑟说：你父亲和你弟兄到你这里来了，
chapters.en: And Pharaoh spake unto Joseph, saying, Thy father and thy brethren are come unto thee:

chapters.zh: 埃及地都在你面前，只管叫你父亲和你弟兄住在国中最好的地；他们可以住在歌珊地。你若知道他们中间有甚么能人，就派他们看管我的牲畜。
chapters.en: The land of Egypt before thee; in the best of the land make thy father and brethren to dwell; in the land of Goshen let them dwell: and if thou knowest men of activity among them, then make them rulers over my cattle.

chapters.zh: 约瑟领他父亲雅各进到法老面前，雅各就给法老祝福。
chapters.en: And Joseph brought in Jacob his father, and set him before Pharaoh: and Jacob blessed Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 法老问雅各说：你平生的年日是多少呢？
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said unto Jacob, How old thou?

chapters.zh: 雅各对法老说：我寄居在世的年日是一百三十岁，我平生的年日又少又苦，不及我列祖早在世寄居的年日。
chapters.en: And Jacob said unto Pharaoh, The days of the years of my pilgrimage an hundred and thirty years: few and evil have the days of the years of my life been, and have not attained unto the days of the years of the life of my fathers in the days of their pilgrimage.

chapters.zh: 雅各又给法老祝福，就从法老面前出去了。
chapters.en: And Jacob blessed Pharaoh, and went out from before Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 约瑟遵著法老的命，把埃及国最好的地，就是兰塞境内的地，给他父亲和弟兄居住，作为产业。
chapters.en: And Joseph placed his father and his brethren, and gave them a possession in the land of Egypt, in the best of the land, in the land of Rameses, as Pharaoh had commanded.

chapters.zh: 约瑟用粮食奉养他父亲和他弟兄，并他父亲全家的眷属，都是照各家的人口奉养他们。
chapters.en: And Joseph nourished his father, and his brethren, and all his father's household, with bread, according to families.

chapters.zh: 饥荒甚大，全地都绝了粮，甚至埃及地和迦南地的人因那饥荒的缘故都饿昏了。
chapters.en: And no bread in all the land; for the famine very sore, so that the land of Egypt and the land of Canaan fainted by reason of the famine.

chapters.zh: 约瑟收聚了埃及地和迦南地所有的银子，就是众人籴粮的银子，约瑟就把那银子带到法老的宫里。
chapters.en: And Joseph gathered up all the money that was found in the land of Egypt, and in the land of Canaan, for the corn which they bought: and Joseph brought the money into Pharaoh's house.

chapters.zh: 埃及地和迦南地的银子都花尽了，埃及众人都来见约瑟，说：我们的银子都用尽了，求你给我们粮食，我们为甚么死在你面前呢？
chapters.en: And when money failed in the land of Egypt, and in the land of Canaan, all the Egyptians came unto Joseph, and said, Give us bread: for why should we die in thy presence? for the money faileth.

chapters.zh: 约瑟说：若是银子用尽了，可以把你们的牲畜给我，我就为你们的牲畜给你们粮食。
chapters.en: And Joseph said, Give your cattle; and I will give you for your cattle, if money fail.

chapters.zh: 于是他们把牲畜赶到约瑟那里，约瑟就拿粮食换了他们的牛、羊、驴、马；那一年因换他们一切的牲畜，就用粮食养活他们。
chapters.en: And they brought their cattle unto Joseph: and Joseph gave them bread for horses, and for the flocks, and for the cattle of the herds, and for the asses: and he fed them with bread for all their cattle for that year.

chapters.zh: 那一年过去，第二年他们又来见约瑟，说：我们不瞒我主，我们的银子都花尽了，牲畜也都归了我主。我们在我主眼前，除了我们的身体和田地之外，一无所剩。
chapters.en: When that year was ended, they came unto him the second year, and said unto him, We will not hide from my lord, how that our money is spent; my lord also hath our herds of cattle; there is not ought left in the sight of my lord, but our bodies, and our lands:

chapters.zh: 你何忍见我们人死地荒呢？求你用粮食买我们的我们的地，我们和我们的地就要给法老效力。又求你给我们种子，使我们得以存活，不至死亡，地土也不至荒凉。
chapters.en: Wherefore shall we die before thine eyes, both we and our land? buy us and our land for bread, and we and our land will be servants unto Pharaoh: and give seed, that we may live, and not die, that the land be not desolate.

chapters.zh: 于是，约瑟为法老买了埃及所有的地，埃及人因被饥荒所迫，各都卖了自己的田地；那地就都归了法老。
chapters.en: And Joseph bought all the land of Egypt for Pharaoh; for the Egyptians sold every man his field, because the famine prevailed over them: so the land became Pharaoh's.

chapters.zh: 至于百姓，约瑟叫他们，从埃及这边直到埃及那边，都各归各城。
chapters.en: And as for the people, he removed them to cities from end of the borders of Egypt even to the end thereof.

chapters.zh: 惟有祭司的地，约瑟没有买，因为祭司有从法老所得的常俸。他们吃法老所给的常俸，所以他们不卖自己的地。
chapters.en: Only the land of the priests bought he not; for the priests had a portion of Pharaoh, and did eat their portion which Pharaoh gave them: wherefore they sold not their lands.

chapters.zh: 约瑟对百姓说：我今日为法老买了你们和你们的地，看哪，这里有种子给你们，你们可以种地。
chapters.en: Then Joseph said unto the people, Behold, I have bought you this day and your land for Pharaoh: lo, seed for you, and ye shall sow the land.

chapters.zh: 后来打粮食的时候，你们要把五分之一纳给法老，四分可以归你们做地里的种子，也做你们和你们家口孩童的食物。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass in the increase, that ye shall give the fifth unto Pharaoh, and four parts shall be your own, for seed of the field, and for your food, and for them of your households, and for food for your little ones.

chapters.zh: 他们说：你救了我们的性命。但愿我们在我主眼前蒙恩，我们就作法老的仆人。
chapters.en: And they said, Thou hast saved our lives: let us find grace in the sight of my lord, and we will be Pharaoh's servants.

chapters.zh: 于是约瑟为埃及地定下常例，直到今日：法老必得五分之一，惟独祭司的地不归法老。
chapters.en: And Joseph made it a law over the land of Egypt unto this day, Pharaoh should have the fifth ; except the land of the priests only, became not Pharaoh's.

chapters.zh: 以色列人住在埃及的歌珊地。他们在那里置了产业，并且生育甚多。
chapters.en: And Israel dwelt in the land of Egypt, in the country of Goshen; and they had possessions therein, and grew, and multiplied exceedingly.

chapters.zh: 雅各住在埃及地十七年，雅各平生的年日是一百四十七岁。
chapters.en: And Jacob lived in the land of Egypt seventeen years: so the whole age of Jacob was an hundred forty and seven years.

chapters.zh: 以色列的死期临近了，他就叫了他儿子约瑟来，说：我若在你眼前蒙恩，请你把手放在我大腿底下，用慈爱和诚实待我，请你不要将我葬在埃及。
chapters.en: And the time drew nigh that Israel must die: and he called his son Joseph, and said unto him, If now I have found grace in thy sight, put, I pray thee, thy hand under my thigh, and deal kindly and truly with me; bury me not, I pray thee, in Egypt:

chapters.zh: 我与我祖我父同睡的时候，你要将我带出埃及，葬在他们所葬的地方。约瑟说：我必遵著你的命而行。
chapters.en: But I will lie with my fathers, and thou shalt carry me out of Egypt, and bury me in their buryingplace. And he said, I will do as thou hast said.

chapters.zh: 雅各说：你要向我起誓。约瑟就向他起了誓，于是以色列在床头上 ( 或作扶著杖头 ) 敬拜神。
chapters.en: And he said, Swear unto me. And he sware unto him. And Israel bowed himself upon the bed's head.

chapters.zh: 这事以后，有人告诉约瑟说：你的父亲病了。他就带著两个儿子玛拿西和以法莲同去。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after these things, that told Joseph, Behold, thy father sick: and he took with him his two sons, Manasseh and Ephraim.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉雅各说：请看，你儿子约瑟到你这里来了。以色列就勉强在床上坐起来。
chapters.en: And told Jacob, and said, Behold, thy son Joseph cometh unto thee: and Israel strengthened himself, and sat upon the bed.

chapters.zh: 雅各对约瑟说：全能的神曾在迦南地的路斯向我显现，赐福与我，
chapters.en: And Jacob said unto Joseph, God Almighty appeared unto me at Luz in the land of Canaan, and blessed me,

chapters.zh: 对我说：我必使你生养众多，成为多民，又要把这地赐给你的后裔，永远为业。
chapters.en: And said unto me, Behold, I will make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, and I will make of thee a multitude of people; and will give this land to thy seed after thee an everlasting possession.

chapters.zh: 未到埃及见你之先，你在埃及地所生的以法莲和玛拿西这两个儿子是我的，正如流便和西缅是我的一样。
chapters.en: And now thy two sons, Ephraim and Manasseh, which were born unto thee in the land of Egypt before I came unto thee into Egypt, mine; as Reuben and Simeon, they shall be mine.

chapters.zh: 你在他们以后所生的就是你的，他们可以归于他们弟兄的名下得产业。
chapters.en: And thy issue, which thou begettest after them, shall be thine, shall be called after the name of their brethren in their inheritance.

chapters.zh: 至于我，我从巴旦来的时候，拉结死在我眼前，在迦南地的路上，离以法他还有一段路程，我就把他葬在以法他的路上 〈 以法他就是伯利恒 〉。
chapters.en: And as for me, when I came from Padan, Rachel died by me in the land of Canaan in the way, when yet but a little way to come unto Ephrath: and I buried her there in the way of Ephrath; the same Bethlehem.

chapters.zh: 以色列看见约瑟的两个儿子，就说：这是谁？
chapters.en: And Israel beheld Joseph's sons, and said, Who these?

chapters.zh: 约瑟对他父亲说：这是神在这里赐给我的儿子。以色列说：请你领他们到我跟前，我要给他们祝福。
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto his father, They my sons, whom God hath given me in this . And he said, Bring them, I pray thee, unto me, and I will bless them.

chapters.zh: 以色列年纪老迈，眼睛昏花，不能看见。约瑟领他们到他跟前，他就和他们亲嘴，抱著他们。
chapters.en: Now the eyes of Israel were dim for age, he could not see. And he brought them near unto him; and he kissed them, and embraced them.

chapters.zh: 以色列对约瑟说：我想不到得见你的面，不料，神又使我得见你的儿子。
chapters.en: And Israel said unto Joseph, I had not thought to see thy face: and, lo, God hath shewed me also thy seed.

chapters.zh: 约瑟把两个儿子从以色列两膝中领出来，自己就脸伏于地下拜。
chapters.en: And Joseph brought them out from between his knees, and he bowed himself with his face to the earth.

chapters.zh: 随后，约瑟又拉著他们两个，以法莲在他的右手里，对著以色列的左手，玛拿西在他的左手里，对著以色列的右手，领他们到以色列的跟前。
chapters.en: And Joseph took them both, Ephraim in his right hand toward Israel's left hand, and Manasseh in his left hand toward Israel's right hand, and brought near unto him.

chapters.zh: 以色列伸出右手来，按在以法莲的头上 〈 以法莲乃是次子 〉，又剪搭过左手来，按在玛拿西的头上 〈 玛拿西原是长子 〉。
chapters.en: And Israel stretched out his right hand, and laid upon Ephraim's head, who the younger, and his left hand upon Manasseh's head, guiding his hands wittingly; for Manasseh the firstborn.

chapters.zh: 他就给约瑟祝福说：愿我祖亚伯拉罕和我父以撒所事奉的神，就是一生牧养我直到今日的神，
chapters.en: And he blessed Joseph, and said, God, before whom my fathers Abraham and Isaac did walk, the God which fed me all my life long unto this day,

chapters.zh: 救赎我脱离一切患难的那使者，赐福与这两个童子。愿他们归在我的名下和我祖亚伯拉罕、我父以撒的名下。又愿他们在世界中生养众多。
chapters.en: The Angel which redeemed me from all evil, bless the lads; and let my name be named on them, and the name of my fathers Abraham and Isaac; and let them grow into a multitude in the midst of the earth.

chapters.zh: 约瑟见他父亲把右手按在以法莲的头上，就不喜悦，便提起他父亲的手，要从以法莲的头上挪到玛拿西的头上。
chapters.en: And when Joseph saw that his father laid his right hand upon the head of Ephraim, it displeased him: and he held up his father's hand, to remove it from Ephraim's head unto Manasseh's head.

chapters.zh: 约瑟对他父亲说：我父，不是这样。这本是长子，求你把右手按在他的头上。
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto his father, Not so, my father: for this the firstborn; put thy right hand upon his head.

chapters.zh: 他父亲不从，说：我知道，我儿，我知道。他也必成为一族，也必昌大。只是他的兄弟将来比他还大；他兄弟的后裔要成为多族。
chapters.en: And his father refused, and said, I know , my son, I know : he also shall become a people, and he also shall be great: but truly his younger brother shall be greater than he, and his seed shall become a multitude of nations.

chapters.zh: 当日就给他们祝福说：以色列人要指著你们祝福说：愿神使你如以法莲、玛拿西一样。于是立以法莲在玛拿西以上。
chapters.en: And he blessed them that day, saying, In thee shall Israel bless, saying, God make thee as Ephraim and as Manasseh: and he set Ephraim before Manasseh.

chapters.zh: 以色列又对约瑟说：我要死了，但神必与你们同在，领你们回到你们列祖之地。
chapters.en: And Israel said unto Joseph, Behold, I die: but God shall be with you, and bring you again unto the land of your fathers.

chapters.zh: 并且我从前用弓用刀从亚摩利人手下夺的那块地，我都赐给你，使你比众弟兄多得一分。
chapters.en: Moreover I have given to thee one portion above thy brethren, which I took out of the hand of the Amorite with my sword and with my bow.

chapters.zh: 雅各叫了他的儿子们来，说：你们都来聚集，我好把你们日后必遇的事告诉你们。
chapters.en: And Jacob called unto his sons, and said, Gather yourselves together, that I may tell you which shall befall you in the last days.

chapters.zh: 雅各的儿子们，你们要聚集而听，要听你们父亲以色列的话。
chapters.en: Gather yourselves together, and hear, ye sons of Jacob; and hearken unto Israel your father.

chapters.zh: 流便哪，你是我的长子，是我力量强壮的时候生的，本当大有尊荣，权力超众。
chapters.en: Reuben, thou my firstborn, my might, and the beginning of my strength, the excellency of dignity, and the excellency of power:

chapters.zh: 但你放纵情欲，滚沸如水，必不得居首位；因为你上了你父亲的床，污秽了我的榻。
chapters.en: Unstable as water, thou shalt not excel; because thou wentest up to thy father's bed; then defiledst thou : he went up to my couch.

chapters.zh: 西缅和利未是弟兄；他们的刀剑是残忍的器具。
chapters.en: Simeon and Levi brethren; instruments of cruelty their habitations.

chapters.zh: 我的灵阿，不要与他们同谋；我的心哪，不要与他们联络；因为他们趁怒杀害人命，任意砍断牛腿大筋。
chapters.en: O my soul, come not thou into their secret; unto their assembly, mine honour, be not thou united: for in their anger they slew a man, and in their selfwill they digged down a wall.

chapters.zh: 他们的怒气暴烈可咒；他们的忿恨残忍可诅。我要使他们分居在雅各家里，散住在以色列地中。
chapters.en: Cursed their anger, for fierce; and their wrath, for it was cruel: I will divide them in Jacob, and scatter them in Israel.

chapters.zh: 犹大阿，你弟兄们必赞美你；你手必掐住仇敌的颈项；你父亲的儿子们必向你下拜。
chapters.en: Judah, thou whom thy brethren shall praise: thy hand in the neck of thine enemies; thy father's children shall bow down before thee.

chapters.zh: 犹大是个小狮子；我儿阿，你抓了食便上去。你屈下身去，卧如公狮，蹲如母狮，谁敢惹你？
chapters.en: Judah a lion's whelp: from the prey, my son, thou art gone up: he stooped down, he couched as a lion, and as an old lion; who shall rouse him up?

chapters.zh: 圭必不离犹大，杖必不离他两脚之间，直等细罗 ( 就是赐平安者 ) 来到，万民都必归顺。
chapters.en: The sceptre shall not depart from Judah, nor a lawgiver from between his feet, until Shiloh come; and unto him the gathering of the people .

chapters.zh: 犹大把小驴拴在葡萄树上，把驴驹拴在美好的葡萄树上。他在葡萄酒中洗了衣服，在葡萄汁中洗了袍褂。
chapters.en: Binding his foal unto the vine, and his ass's colt unto the choice vine; he washed his garments in wine, and his clothes in the blood of grapes:

chapters.zh: 他的眼睛必因酒红润；他的牙齿必因奶白亮。
chapters.en: His eyes red with wine, and his teeth white with milk.

chapters.zh: 西布伦必住在海口，必成为停船的海口；他的境界必延到西顿。
chapters.en: Zebulun shall dwell at the haven of the sea; and he for an haven of ships; and his border unto Zidon.

chapters.zh: 以萨迦是个强壮的驴，卧在羊圈之中。
chapters.en: Issachar a strong ass couching down between two burdens:

chapters.zh: 他以安静为佳，以肥地为美，便低肩背重，成为服苦的仆人。
chapters.en: And he saw that rest good, and the land that pleasant; and bowed his shoulder to bear, and became a servant unto tribute.

chapters.zh: 但必判断他的民，作以色列支派之一。
chapters.en: Dan shall judge his people, as one of the tribes of Israel.

chapters.zh: 但必作道上的蛇，路中的虺，咬伤马蹄，使骑马的坠落于后。
chapters.en: Dan shall be a serpent by the way, an adder in the path, that biteth the horse heels, so that his rider shall fall backward.

chapters.zh: 耶和华阿，我向来等候你的救恩。
chapters.en: I have waited for thy salvation, O LORD.

chapters.zh: 迦得必被敌军追逼，他却要追逼他们的脚跟。
chapters.en: Gad, a troop shall overcome him: but he shall overcome at the last.

chapters.zh: 亚设之地必出肥美的粮食，且出君王的美味。
chapters.en: Out of Asher his bread fat, and he shall yield royal dainties.

chapters.zh: 拿弗他利是被释放的母鹿；他出嘉美的言语。
chapters.en: Naphtali a hind let loose: he giveth goodly words.

chapters.zh: 约瑟是多结果子的树枝，是泉旁多结果的枝子；他的枝条探出墙外。
chapters.en: Joseph a fruitful bough, a fruitful bough by a well; branches run over the wall:

chapters.zh: 弓箭手将他苦害，向他射箭，逼迫他。
chapters.en: The archers have sorely grieved him, and shot , and hated him:

chapters.zh: 但他的弓仍旧坚硬；他的手健壮敏捷。这是因以色列的牧者，以色列的磐石 ─ 就是雅各的大能者。
chapters.en: But his bow abode in strength, and the arms of his hands were made strong by the hands of the mighty of Jacob; (from thence the shepherd, the stone of Israel:)

chapters.zh: 你父亲的神必帮助你；那全能者必将天上所有的福，地里所藏的福，以及生产乳养的福，都赐给你。
chapters.en: by the God of thy father, who shall help thee; and by the Almighty, who shall bless thee with blessings of heaven above, blessings of the deep that lieth under, blessings of the breasts, and of the womb:

chapters.zh: 你父亲所祝的福，胜过我祖先所祝的福，如永世的山岭，至极的边界；这些福必降在约瑟的头上，临到那与弟兄迥别之人的顶上。
chapters.en: The blessings of thy father have prevailed above the blessings of my progenitors unto the utmost bound of the everlasting hills: they shall be on the head of Joseph, and on the crown of the head of him that was separate from his brethren.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯是个撕掠的狼，早晨要吃他所抓的，晚上要分他所夺的。
chapters.en: Benjamin shall ravin a wolf: in the morning he shall devour the prey, and at night he shall divide the spoil.

chapters.zh: 这一切是以色列的十二支派；这也是他们的父亲对他们所说的话，为他们所祝的福，都是按著各人的福分为他们祝福。
chapters.en: All these the twelve tribes of Israel: and this that their father spake unto them, and blessed them; every one according to his blessing he blessed them.

chapters.zh: 他又嘱咐他们说：我将要归到我列祖 ( 原文作本民 ) 那里，你们要将我葬在赫人以弗仑田间的洞里，与我祖我父在一处，
chapters.en: And he charged them, and said unto them, I am to be gathered unto my people: bury me with my fathers in the cave that in the field of Ephron the Hittite,

chapters.zh: 就是在迦南地幔利前、麦比拉田间的洞；那洞和田是亚伯拉罕向赫人以弗仑买来为业，作坟地的。
chapters.en: In the cave that in the field of Machpelah, which before Mamre, in the land of Canaan, which Abraham bought with the field of Ephron the Hittite for a possession of a buryingplace.

chapters.zh: 他们在那里葬了亚伯拉罕和他妻撒拉，又在那里葬了以撒和他的妻子利百加；我也在那里葬了利亚。
chapters.en: There they buried Abraham and Sarah his wife; there they buried Isaac and Rebekah his wife; and there I buried Leah.

chapters.zh: 那块田和田间的洞原是向赫人买的。
chapters.en: The purchase of the field and of the cave that therein from the children of Heth.

chapters.zh: 雅各嘱咐众子已毕，就把脚收在床上，气绝而死，归到列祖 ( 原文作本民 ) 那里去了。
chapters.en: And when Jacob had made an end of commanding his sons, he gathered up his feet into the bed, and yielded up the ghost, and was gathered unto his people.

chapters.zh: 约瑟伏在他父亲的面上哀哭，与他亲嘴。
chapters.en: And Joseph fell upon his father's face, and wept upon him, and kissed him.

chapters.zh: 约瑟吩咐伺候他的医生用香料薰他父亲，医生就用香料薰了以色列。
chapters.en: And Joseph commanded his servants the physicians to embalm his father: and the physicians embalmed Israel.

chapters.zh: 薰尸的常例是四十天；那四十天满了，埃及人为他哀哭了七十天。
chapters.en: And forty days were fulfilled for him; for so are fulfilled the days of those which are embalmed: and the Egyptians mourned for him threescore and ten days.

chapters.zh: 为他哀哭的日子过了，约瑟对法老家中的人说：我若在你们眼前蒙恩，请你们报告法老说：
chapters.en: And when the days of his mourning were past, Joseph spake unto the house of Pharaoh, saying, If now I have found grace in your eyes, speak, I pray you, in the ears of Pharaoh, saying,

chapters.zh: 我父亲要死的时候叫我起誓说：你要将我葬在迦南地，在我为自己所掘的坟墓里。现在求你让我上去葬我父亲，以后我必回来。
chapters.en: My father made me swear, saying, Lo, I die: in my grave which I have digged for me in the land of Canaan, there shalt thou bury me. Now therefore let me go up, I pray thee, and bury my father, and I will come again.

chapters.zh: 法老说：你可以上去，照著你父亲叫你起的誓，将他葬埋。
chapters.en: And Pharaoh said, Go up, and bury thy father, according as he made thee swear.

chapters.zh: 于是约瑟上去葬他父亲。与他一同上去的，有法老的臣仆和法老家中的长老，并埃及国的长老，
chapters.en: And Joseph went up to bury his father: and with him went up all the servants of Pharaoh, the elders of his house, and all the elders of the land of Egypt,

chapters.zh: 还有约瑟的全家和他的弟兄们，并他父亲的眷属；只有他们的妇人孩子，和羊群牛群，都留在歌珊地。
chapters.en: And all the house of Joseph, and his brethren, and his father's house: only their little ones, and their flocks, and their herds, they left in the land of Goshen.

chapters.zh: 又有车辆马兵，和他一同上去；那一帮人甚多。
chapters.en: And there went up with him both chariots and horsemen: and it was a very great company.

chapters.zh: 他们到了约但河外、亚达的禾场，就在那里大大地号咷痛哭。约瑟为他父亲哀哭了七天。
chapters.en: And they came to the threshingfloor of Atad, which beyond Jordan, and there they mourned with a great and very sore lamentation: and he made a mourning for his father seven days.

chapters.zh: 迦南的居民见亚达禾场上的哀哭，就说：这是埃及人一场大的哀哭。因此那地方名叫亚伯麦西，是在约但河东。
chapters.en: And when the inhabitants of the land, the Canaanites, saw the mourning in the floor of Atad, they said, This a grievous mourning to the Egyptians: wherefore the name of it was called Abelmizraim, which beyond Jordan.

chapters.zh: 雅各的儿子们就遵著他父亲所吩咐的办了，
chapters.en: And his sons did unto him according as he commanded them:

chapters.zh: 把他搬到迦南地，葬在幔利前、麦比拉田间的洞里；那洞和田是亚伯拉罕向赫人以弗仑买来为业，作坟地的。
chapters.en: For his sons carried him into the land of Canaan, and buried him in the cave of the field of Machpelah, which Abraham bought with the field for a possession of a buryingplace of Ephron the Hittite, before Mamre.

chapters.zh: 约瑟葬了他父亲以后，就和众弟兄，并一切同他上去葬他父亲的人，都回埃及去了。
chapters.en: And Joseph returned into Egypt, he, and his brethren, and all that went up with him to bury his father, after he had buried his father.

chapters.zh: 约瑟的哥哥们见父亲死了，就说：或者约瑟怀恨我们，照著我们从前待他一切的恶足足的报复我们。
chapters.en: And when Joseph's brethren saw that their father was dead, they said, Joseph will peradventure hate us, and will certainly requite us all the evil which we did unto him.

chapters.zh: 他们就打发人去见约瑟，说：你父亲未死以先吩咐说：
chapters.en: And they sent a messenger unto Joseph, saying, Thy father did command before he died, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们要对约瑟这样说：从前你哥哥们恶待你，求你饶恕他们的过犯和罪恶。如今求你饶恕你父亲神之仆人的过犯。他们对约瑟说这话，约瑟就哭了。
chapters.en: So shall ye say unto Joseph, Forgive, I pray thee now, the trespass of thy brethren, and their sin; for they did unto thee evil: and now, we pray thee, forgive the trespass of the servants of the God of thy father. And Joseph wept when they spake unto him.

chapters.zh: 他的哥哥们又来俯伏在他面前，说：我们是你的仆人。
chapters.en: And his brethren also went and fell down before his face; and they said, Behold, we thy servants.

chapters.zh: 约瑟对他们说：不要害怕，我岂能代替神呢？
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto them, Fear not: for I in the place of God?

chapters.zh: 从前你们的意思是要害我，但神的意思原是好的，要保全许多人的性命，成就今日的光景。
chapters.en: But as for you, ye thought evil against me; God meant it unto good, to bring to pass, as this day, to save much people alive.

chapters.zh: 现在你们不要害怕，我必养活你们和你们的妇人孩子。于是约瑟用亲爱的话安慰他们。
chapters.en: Now therefore fear ye not: I will nourish you, and your little ones. And he comforted them, and spake kindly unto them.

chapters.zh: 约瑟和他父亲的眷属都住在埃及。约瑟活了一百一十岁。
chapters.en: And Joseph dwelt in Egypt, he, and his father's house: and Joseph lived an hundred and ten years.

chapters.zh: 约瑟得见以法莲第三代的子孙。玛拿西的孙子、玛吉的儿子也养在约瑟的膝上。
chapters.en: And Joseph saw Ephraim's children of the third : the children also of Machir the son of Manasseh were brought up upon Joseph's knees.

chapters.zh: 约瑟对他弟兄们说：我要死了，但神必定看顾你们，领你们从这地上去，到他起誓所应许给亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各之地。
chapters.en: And Joseph said unto his brethren, I die: and God will surely visit you, and bring you out of this land unto the land which he sware to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob.

chapters.zh: 约瑟叫以色列的子孙起誓说：神必定看顾你们；你们要把我的骸骨从这里搬上去。
chapters.en: And Joseph took an oath of the children of Israel, saying, God will surely visit you, and ye shall carry up my bones from hence.

chapters.zh: 约瑟死了，正一百一十岁。人用香料将他薰了，把他收殓在棺材里，停在埃及。
chapters.en: So Joseph died, an hundred and ten years old: and they embalmed him, and he was put in a coffin in Egypt.
